name: NRSC Team
subject: Electric cars could use more fossil fuels . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
That’s right, 40% of our electricity comes from fossil fuels
Fellow American

If you want to see what it looks like when the Left holds power for too long, look no farther than California. The historically blue state now boasts an average gas price per gallon of $4.70 compared to the national average of $3.49.

If this doesn’t tell you how badly Republicans need to take back control in Washington, we don’t know how else to communicate it to you. [**Will you please send in your support of $4.70, worth one gallon of California gas, to help Conservatives take back control in Washington and help end this insanity?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=40dca27490004ec391cf27fa1ea8d5a5&_e=ESVilsRwmVNFFWh02DTwTkCW0z4PiFEG93lMI_boUYUdXCzv7_hBiTkAkf_nFmCj_tga4rVSqDUhbycQxFQ2vUKgTKcvK9tQVT8FRFsMM5aXmc-t5BueL_WVOEtzy9YNy1uZd8qUX511okBN8d6kpM6nyD88eWPQawzEVPJ9RgYIL7LZ-EwgV1H-zS2ga5dSPT3MFp9LLQJ4bciCmHO6Vz0Ngm2gSNC5e7SMqxa5TRJ5fxHuYP-F70GTwkyQmlFfaTEjSyIlY9Tab_yZ6i2MfBZ2rDxKi-2xNLR6Q4Uk2WeBUjQMYasKavvlGhfJLHcSV8VYmN67iEhFAsSsFGGGl7hrT5dJrtwxDlQ9zP_ZDKpdJ4q-ApesPR5aetwB_FOfsIvq2bWWOx-obFYy3AzoNd_8FRoXldiXnD_qFXcUR3hvlTuFO9uQ8M4iyVEltpNvFBWh7PFVTJ3B6WH36YagGQ%3D%3D)

[**SUPPORT CONSERVATIVES WITH ONE GALLON’S WORTH OF CALIFORNIA GAS - $4.70 -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=40dca27490004ec391cf27fa1ea8d5a5&_e=ESVilsRwmVNFFWh02DTwTkCW0z4PiFEG93lMI_boUYUdXCzv7_hBiTkAkf_nFmCj_tga4rVSqDUhbycQxFQ2vUKgTKcvK9tQVT8FRFsMM5aXmc-t5BueL_WVOEtzy9YNy1uZd8qUX511okBN8d6kpM6nyD88eWPQawzEVPJ9RgYIL7LZ-EwgV1H-zS2ga5dSPT3MFp9LLQJ4bciCmHO6Vz0Ngm2gSNC5e7SMqxa5TRJ5fxHuYP-F70GTwkyQmlFf2gRybaNIHOrAJsEpyHQc-D4vdT3pyMYH2aYkFRKs6IX8veXNCb5aa1HttYEdQ3gyCEwa_UWFbk_Lj1EuQAMoG-w4PuF9a9ReBAcSnhy8cW-mTD9JgUsge5JvfAoKA3_tzLvHD4G1seV2ZjPo7mvzo0Ou4hSqNPKSeV2FsWQVZUKXgqwiyYAVrRHGJZSOEuWP4061h8GdTD_3o4YdF-EnNQ%3D%3D)
The Left wants to “get rid of fossil fuel burning cars” and ban the sale of new gas-powered cars in the coming years replacing them with electric cars. Genius, right? **Until you realize that 40% of America’s electricity comes from natural gas which is . . . here comes the punch line . . . A FOSSIL FUEL.**

Democrats in Washington think the American people aren’t smart enough to come in out of the rain. They’re not a government by the people for the people, they’re power-hungry elitists who don’t think twice about how their policy will affect the American people.

clean_body: That’s right, 40% of our electricity comes from fossil fuels Fellow American If you want to see what it looks like when the Left holds power for too long, look no farther than California. The historically blue state now boasts an average gas price per gallon of $4.70 compared to the national average of $3.49. If this doesn’t tell you how badly Republicans need to take back control in Washington, we don’t know how else to communicate it to you. The Left wants to “get rid of fossil fuel burning cars” and ban the sale of new gas-powered cars in the coming years replacing them with electric cars. Genius, right? Until you realize that 40% of America’s electricity comes from natural gas which is . . . here comes the punch line . . . A FOSSIL FUEL. Democrats in Washington think the American people aren’t smart enough to come in out of the rain. They’re not a government by the people for the people, they’re power-hungry elitists who don’t think twice about how their policy will affect the American people. To put it comparatively, if the average Californian has a 14-gallon tank in their car that they fill up once per week at $4.70, that’s an extra $17 per week or $884 per year above the national average. Thank you, Team NRSC If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. | | | Hi there, If you order DoorDash in Tacoma, it might be me delivering your order 👋 [_I’m not a wealthy, self-funded candidate, which is why I appreciate every dollar given to my campaign. Please chip in here if you can, so I can keep growing my team and win this race._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42005120/331275521/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODk3MGJiYy0xNTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfrjxIJ-gN9rZLE5JVBAt6yh28I121as-2MHT27t_7Y=) My work slowed down a lot during the pandemic and hasn’t picked back up to where it was, so I’m supplementing with DoorDash. The pandemic has been challenging for me, with periods of housing instability — it’s been hard for so many people. I’ve met a senior who skips prescriptions so she can afford rent, a person in a wheelchair living in an encampment because she can’t afford to rent a place with a wheelchair ramp, a young family doubling up with extra roommates because they can’t afford a mortgage. And it’s not only here in my district; it’s across the country. 30 million people don’t have healthcare — during a pandemic. 1 in 5 kids are going hungry — during a pandemic. The bipartisan elite just let the expanded Child Tax Credit expire, pushing 4 million kids into poverty — during a pandemic. [**I’m running for Congress to fight for jobs, housing, and healthcare for all. I’m running because time is running out on climate. If you can, please chip into my campaign, because I’m not fighting for corporations and their lobbyists — I’m fighting for At a recent rally, Donald Trump threatened MASSIVE street protests all over the country because he's starting to feel the heat from prosecutors investigating him and his business dealings.

**We’re short of our goal of 75,000 responses, so please answer now:

name: Don Huffines
subject: [DISGUSTING] Abbott took $ from child gender modification clinics
body:
and I won’t allow it
and I won't allow it [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qbdkkt-yuddtktydi-r/) Fellow Patriot,Greg Abbott, Lt. Governor Dan Patrick, and Rep. Dade Phelan have collectively [received $2.47 million in campaign contributions](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qbdkkt-yuddtktydi-y/) from Border Health PAC and Friends of UT Southwestern Medical Center PAC since 2015 . . . _. . . both PACs are directly affiliated with pediatric gender modification centers._ [VOTE NOW TO PROTECT OUR CHILDREN](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qbdkkt-yuddtktydi-j/) In this election cycle ALONE, Abbott, Patrick, and Phelan have received $400,000 from Border Health PAC, which is linked to the Doctors Hospital Renaissance . . . _. . . and they provide gender modification for minors!_ For too long, Texans have been represented by Republicans who are too afraid to do their duty--when I am your Republican governor, that will change.It's time for an actual Republican in the governor's mansion who will put an end to this child abuse because it has NO PLACE in Texas.For Texas, [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qbdkkt-yuddtktydi-t/) **Don Huffines for Governor****An Actual Republican** [VOTE NOW TO PROTECT OUR CHILDREN](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qbdkkt-yuddtktydi-i/) [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qbdkkt-yuddtktydi-d/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qbdkkt-yuddtktydi-h/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qbdkkt-yuddtktydi-o/) | _Copyright(C) 2021 Don Huffines Campaign, All rights reserved._You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. **Our Mailing Address:**

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: This is the last email we’ll send before our deadline.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Hey, it’s
Nick, Beto’s campaign manager.

I know it’s late on a Saturday, so I’ll keep this short. We have just a
few hours left before our TEC deadline at midnight. Everything we raise
will be made public.

With reporters already reaching out and asking if we’re going to be
outraised by Abbott, it’s really important that we reach our $750,000
fundraising goal before midnight.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53432?refcode=ema20220219-177019&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=177019%2E444211%2EzF0O4G ]Will
you rush a $3 contribution right now, ahead of our midnight
deadline? Every donation will help us reach more voters across all of
Texas’ 254 counties.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53432?refcode=ema20220219-177019&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=177019%2E444211%2EzF0O4G ]Contribute $3

Our organizers and volunteers are hard at work to reach 3 million voters
before March 1st. We’re building the biggest, hardest working organizing
program that Texas has ever seen to defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto.
But, it’s absolutely crucial that we reach every goal that we set.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53432?refcode=ema20220219-177019&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=177019%2E444211%2EzF0O4G ]Please add your first
contribution to help us reach our $750,000 goal before midnight.

—Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=177019%2E444211%2EzF0O4G

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

body:

We email you every day about the WORST Republicans.

But team, we need to know exactly what our best grassroots supporters think... **So we’re asking for [150] local responses by midnight:**

**[150] LOCAL DEMOCRATIC RESPONSES NEEDED**
**FIRST:** Republicans ECHOED and AMPLIFIED Donald Trump’s Big Lie.

**THEN:** Far-right Senators REFUSED to hold Trump accountable for his deadly Jan. 6 coup attempt!

**So please, be one of the 150 local Democrats we need to respond to our [[ [ANTI‐REPUBLICAN FLASH POLL](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Worst_Republican_Poll/?refcode=VPP_20220219_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=1301%2E878179%2EFnyqMI) ]] by midnight.**

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: Here comes the USA Freedom Convoy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
---
| | |
Peter

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59609382:JdSUdXE7N:m:1:3253819041:D3B69AF5C6DBD78CA38F15F86308F123:r)_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power.**

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, [**_which is why we 're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59609382:JdSUdXE7N:m:1:3253819041:D3B69AF5C6DBD78CA38F15F86308F123:r)

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig! [**_$15 = 10 Miles_**

**_$30 = 20 Miles_**

**_$150 = 100 Miles_**

**_$375 = 250 Miles_**

**_$750 = 500 Miles_**

**_$1,500 = 1,000 Miles_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59609382:JdSUdXE7N:m:1:3253819041:D3B69AF5C6DBD78CA38F15F86308F123:r)
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

[**_So, I hope you 'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59609382:JdSUdXE7N:m:1:3253819041:D3B69AF5C6DBD78CA38F15F86308F123:r)

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

| Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

subject: This Isn’t Over!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement

>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq
# Dear Hoosiers,
While I know the decision of the Indiana Elections Division to remove my name along with the other U.S. Senate candidates from the primary ballot yesterday was disheartening for many of you, I want you to know this isn’t the end of the journey.

Together, the Senate candidates collected nearly 17,000 signatures and raised nearly a quarter of a million dollars. The evidence is overwhelming that Hoosiers wanted options in the primaries on both sides of the aisle and I guarantee you, you will still have options and a chance to support me in the general election.

Keep your heads up, stay strong, and God bless each and every one of you! Visit HaneefahKhaaliq.org and support today! #voteHK

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
2022

* Check your voter's registration right by clicking [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=03c07f84cc&e=a49cb82bb3). You must be a registered voter in order to support me in any election. Then, set a goal to ask nine (9) other people this week if they are registered to vote in Indiana. We can't afford to wait until the last minute. **Have questions? Email hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592 right now! **
* Check out and share my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=f24d7828f3&e=a49cb82bb3) posts and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=bfcaabffe7&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $25 to this grassroots campaign now!

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcbo06mrgmm0710n06g0ranhi9nd0qc0ao9oshl8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onm6por9d1j6mqeed3h6orb6pr2maoeao3j6uo6ep5memoj7dpge3i68crmc8pbeduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4db661qbbcj7mti6cclgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o71cjh2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjmsn7a57hhri9gg87u1cluhcq4i2vr88jp1cmg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o71cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr8m55nedvl25f26v6qnd3pouarmk351kht8g6pg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o71cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfodqnnbshb1maa4clerf97v7445mf34pj88e888_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o71cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z19umkmpvfigtq7910smj3stbii1ro0jrkdbpah8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoaljb9m4lh9df6hupmevqis37qc2o972spt7nng_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o71cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.

Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0fkij6023dlspfh4sagc5bomdqhndfsl1hrvadg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2p70c1h2bs)
---
**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuuggbejj50dauon0ob96q9utk7636sg5geucdl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2p70c1h2bs)

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb2nvjcej57dphc9keg4ldehcvuj6p8r98ac6cj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2p70c1h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjamhq5ucoulv5e0009a1todlqc0qmkp3f8gjhcg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2p70c1h2bs)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That’s why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.

Thank you,

name: Ann Coulter
subject: How to stop the intolerant left
body:
A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-call
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv1esr50k0ccc45cn5bobpppcm3bdtrgohbbbs30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uurm0sb0maqbbcrim9o67chgs6qbedpic1gr9p3261qrbddiesqe3dbhckqb3dpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlciqrcc3i6hj3collm3jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1clj6aob0sti649fg)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztht4m92hu7f2faajug1b9jepmdkj8otk5ckepvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o77chh2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z84ovopdihgle3mjg37rhkeo4ht70jpg8anc8qq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o77chh2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh6dtssq7ri9ae9ari95tcb91hf5n79vm3nlc9r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o77chh2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z498spl3udq1aagg1he6dqu1u9oaj3aouvdk3660_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o77chh2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3pk38gcv0hs94ud9hrs8vae22svpuqgk1uk9ea8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o77chh2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zomt18auoh3sn1ugrq4ul7119rkt8vok949tpar8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o77chh2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6ibnuv9hec31id3qrqfma7fm799qfmveq7a02i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o77chh2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdu932g1b3hf1ltq8b0bqsr8lqlgrmto5glb6hfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o77chh2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl36ahcgrt5afat6hfvejdjgmj8s8b70d5bi24s8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim2o77chh2bs)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE
body:
Sunday, February 20th Edition
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mDBLDAMlcaLqiITu7oEVhwX9dPC2aoQKFZdtfX8k3K_T0RBrU0r9Bf0wHrDnjrqOVq1EQGDuPELDQzkt-Z3mF4usQIPVzssNmt9SBnEHwZ1wOAe2FRi_heD2ByVEbtvecREtICInzKdMd7tpFV2vBg==&c=99BHwA-wcR4xnskcmrj_BP3XQCH22J0om3P1JUYO4_AXpqyI58QUFQ==&ch=N5QHrpMtG-rRAggJbzAvYBUCXnUy2ucx_KR0RT5MybcZP4ToYhKZZg==)

# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
February 20, 2022 | Issue VIII
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Senate Republicans: End The Mandates
---
Leader Ortt & Senate Republicans Announce they will Force Vote to End the Mandates, Unmask Our Kids, & Return NY to Normal
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mDBLDAMlcaLqiITu7oEVhwX9dPC2aoQKFZdtfX8k3K_T0RBrU0r9BdiLjHa1jFy1UQw7aqnXgv6PbOilCkODAuzId1xNSx_rcycR4yVdpDog8o_3lbkx-PKgDsaboRxsEfb1Ta1pNV--7oOCIUadI7EsOIaVZbGdidDBKwBfydJK1AkTptmg3_FzveeyiaeUhSajXGe27M15u6I9LIrTiO0-hFM00MFBYlQ3GXq-lIg-zdjyPUfVeYi79Zchfd2p_scAsdB7YLLEnox08JgOvzraQ-UMc19o7jDY4I3T4rg=&c=99BHwA-wcR4xnskcmrj_BP3XQCH22J0om3P1JUYO4_AXpqyI58QUFQ==&ch=N5QHrpMtG-rRAggJbzAvYBUCXnUy2ucx_KR0RT5MybcZP4ToYhKZZg==)
---
On Monday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and members of the Senate Republican Conference called for an END to unconstitutional mandates promulgated by Governor Kathy Hochul and her Department of Health. The Republicans announced they would force a vote on the New York Senate floor that afternoon to end the mandates.
This vote comes in the wake of the so-called vax or mask business mandate being lifted, but with the mask mandate in schools and childcare centers [remaining in place](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mDBLDAMlcaLqiITu7oEVhwX9dPC2aoQKFZdtfX8k3K_T0RBrU0r9BdiLjHa1jFy1UQw7aqnXgv6PbOilCkODAuzId1xNSx_rcycR4yVdpDog8o_3lbkx-PKgDsaboRxsEfb1Ta1pNV--7oOCIUadI7EsOIaVZbGdidDBKwBfydJK1AkTptmg3_FzveeyiaeUhSajXGe27M15u6I9LIrTiO0-hFM00MFBYlQ3GXq-lIg-zdjyPUfVeYi79Zchfd2p_scAsdB7YLLEnox08JgOvzraQ-UMc19o7jDY4I3T4rg=&c=99BHwA-wcR4xnskcmrj_BP3XQCH22J0om3P1JUYO4_AXpqyI58QUFQ==&ch=N5QHrpMtG-rRAggJbzAvYBUCXnUy2ucx_KR0RT5MybcZP4ToYhKZZg==). Children are the least vulnerable individuals with regard to COVID-19, but the most susceptible to psychological damage due to their lives being upended for the past two years.
---
| [READ FULL RELEASE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mDBLDAMlcaLqiITu7oEVhwX9dPC2aoQKFZdtfX8k3K_T0RBrU0r9BdiLjHa1jFy1pGAoUkVoMKTuPc7MZfFlwEQdQzmr69P0uogixuCP0uUNk_kaom93jZXXa5dKVgzwCtw7TVoVvAa2ddbcSsSSRzbdB9IXXZCiw34C3TLR7vxPFbRC9iHKRXc_jO31o3vNU77pXbFaJbI=&c=99BHwA-wcR4xnskcmrj_BP3XQCH22J0om3P1JUYO4_AXpqyI58QUFQ==&ch=N5QHrpMtG-rRAggJbzAvYBUCXnUy2ucx_KR0RT5MybcZP4ToYhKZZg==)
---
|
---
Leader Ortt's Response to the Senate Democrats Voting DOWN the Amendment to End the Mask Mandate in Schools & Daycare Centers
---
Monday, February 14, 2022
---
"Today, Senate Republicans put forward an amendment to finally end the mask mandate in schools and daycare centers, but not one Senate Democrat had the courage to stand in support of it. Our Conference put this important amendment forward on behalf of the millions of New Yorkers who are beyond tired and fed up with overreaching mandates from Albany bureaucrats.
This amendment was an opportunity for every New Yorker to learn where their State Senator stands on this issue, and it's clear: Senate Republicans stand with New Yorkers, and Senate Democrats are content to let political science continue to drive the decisions coming out of Albany."
---
---
|
---
| Senate Republicans: End The Emergency Now
---
Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Will Introduce Resolution to END the Emergency Declared on February 14th by Governor Hochul
---
On Thursday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt announced he will introduce a resolution to immediately end the "statewide disaster emergency" declared by Governor Kathy Hochul earlier this week.
"By unilaterally extending her emergency powers without any input from the Legislature, Governor Hochul is following the playbook of her disgraced predecessor - and not following her own administration's science and data. Albany's ruling class is clearly more worried about political science and holding onto power than letting New Yorkers decide what is best for themselves. My constituents and millions of our state's residents are fed up. It's time to stop governing by arbitrary mandates, restore checks and balances, and end the emergency today," said Leader Ortt.
Senator Ortt's concurrent resolution would nullify the Governor's unscientific Executive Order and immediately put an end to the statewide disaster emergency, if passed in both houses of the State Legislature.
---
| [READ FULL RELEASE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mDBLDAMlcaLqiITu7oEVhwX9dPC2aoQKFZdtfX8k3K_T0RBrU0r9BdiLjHa1jFy1Nrfk0rw7LuL9x6drupQdYOynSEmibS5uC-uKd01wHK-nD8HwEetHayZ6wO-dPF2YvmjK35XNRpQFyIctwmrxmdDWEanO9HJ1KNDFMFk2k4t4VXIeQeLJS7JhLigihc3_6Eq677FsRrBVXSGIcGIpNw==&c=99BHwA-wcR4xnskcmrj_BP3XQCH22J0om3P1JUYO4_AXpqyI58QUFQ==&ch=N5QHrpMtG-rRAggJbzAvYBUCXnUy2ucx_KR0RT5MybcZP4ToYhKZZg==)

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mDBLDAMlcaLqiITu7oEVhwX9dPC2aoQKFZdtfX8k3K_T0RBrU0r9BZnCkrVHD_XdI8YuNNYV-fLJsT7mHT4o1xsAdc_mJkSxfp0Tpbbn7mu0kCR-lJ5LJeGb3c9Rxx052ospP1xRdpfLYWa7OyZrPytSBJIEed_ZNdIiHvDPpE6yuu4-aOzB4GLoJdLmkU6MucRu_-HuR6n5k57k3bTEaQ==&c=99BHwA-wcR4xnskcmrj_BP3XQCH22J0om3P1JUYO4_AXpqyI58QUFQ==&ch=N5QHrpMtG-rRAggJbzAvYBUCXnUy2ucx_KR0RT5MybcZP4ToYhKZZg==)
---
| | Statement from Leader Rob Ortt on the Announcement of Senator Patty Ritchie's Retirement Wednesday, February 16 2022
---
| | | |
---|---
|
Senator Patty Ritchie has been an outstanding representative for the North County and a trusted leader and colleague within the Senate Republican Conference.

As the representative of Fort Drum, there has been no bigger supporter of our military men and women and their families. She understands the vital role the agriculture industry plays in our economy, and year after year, Senator Ritchie championed increased funding and initiatives to help our family farmers. And she has been at the forefront of state efforts to strengthen our relationship with Canada, with whom her district shares the longest length of border in the state.

With more than three decades of public service - first as County Clerk and for the past 12 years as a State Senator - Patty Ritchie has truly left her mark, and the people of New York have been well served by her dedicated leadership.

On behalf of the Senate Republican Conference and all the people of New York, I want to sincerely thank Senator Ritchie for her many years of service, and wish her all the best in her retirement.

###
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mDBLDAMlcaLqiITu7oEVhwX9dPC2aoQKFZdtfX8k3K_T0RBrU0r9BdiLjHa1jFy1ExN-FJCmihTRM7GzLjhcLwUzIA6BsGWxjrYjk7ck92NsOulN3dy8FA5mv3rFKDBO4Amb0ZjDvXRAA3m6MrAk9SGETqnk9cxEU_IiFL_qMxs=&c=99BHwA-wcR4xnskcmrj_BP3XQCH22J0om3P1JUYO4_AXpqyI58QUFQ==&ch=N5QHrpMtG-rRAggJbzAvYBUCXnUy2ucx_KR0RT5MybcZP4ToYhKZZg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mDBLDAMlcaLqiITu7oEVhwX9dPC2aoQKFZdtfX8k3K_T0RBrU0r9BdiLjHa1jFy1UD0EqZeafOsjJCQYJG8y1I5Mcjsg-p2OmjkWSbYQS-cHxSoKM0AmoKDuHuKGmEtVejsIgOyz1nzH6N65g_cnEtU81l1pvPiO&c=99BHwA-wcR4xnskcmrj_BP3XQCH22J0om3P1JUYO4_AXpqyI58QUFQ==&ch=N5QHrpMtG-rRAggJbzAvYBUCXnUy2ucx_KR0RT5MybcZP4ToYhKZZg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mDBLDAMlcaLqiITu7oEVhwX9dPC2aoQKFZdtfX8k3K_T0RBrU0r9BdiLjHa1jFy17SN6VWqrfUpOH-unhRYJl9ESL9LW0xiew0qNZJH1K4JKKA7p2lvQje1qWS4VFgKhJIFmjkUELOIUexaHpiS_y1-NcnMxF1AkjxM9mNoxdx0=&c=99BHwA-wcR4xnskcmrj_BP3XQCH22J0om3P1JUYO4_AXpqyI58QUFQ==&ch=N5QHrpMtG-rRAggJbzAvYBUCXnUy2ucx_KR0RT5MybcZP4ToYhKZZg==)
---
| Leader Rob Ortt Endorses Mark Walczyk for NYS Senate
"I am proud to support Mark Walczyk for New York State Senate. His proven record delivering for the North Country and service to our country will make him a valued member of our Senate Republican Conference.
We must end radical one-party rule in Albany and restore checks and balances. To do this, we need leaders who are willing to fight back in Albany and be a voice for their constituents back home. I look forward to working with Mark to stop Albany's pro-criminal, pro-tax, pro-mandate agenda. With leaders like Mark, we will get back to serving hardworking families across the state."
---
| |
---
| |

"By unilaterally extending her emergency powers without any input from the Legislature, Governor Hochul is following the playbook of her disgraced predecessor - and not following her own administration's science and data. Albany's ruling class is clearly more worried about political science and holding onto power than letting New Yorkers decide what is best for themselves. My constituents and millions of our state's residents are fed up. It's time to stop governing by arbitrary mandates, restore checks and balances, and end the emergency today," said Leader Ortt. Senator Ortt's concurrent resolution would nullify the Governor's unscientific Executive Order and immediately put an end to the statewide disaster emergency, if passed in both houses of the State Legislature. | == == | | Statement from Leader Rob Ortt on the Announcement of Senator Patty Ritchie's Retirement Wednesday, February 16 2022 | | | | ---|--- | Senator Patty Ritchie has been an outstanding representative for the North County and a trusted leader and colleague within the Senate Republican Conference. As the representative of Fort Drum, there has been no bigger supporter of our military men and women and their families. She understands the vital role the agriculture industry plays in our economy, and year after year, Senator Ritchie championed increased funding and initiatives to help our family farmers. And she has been at the forefront of state efforts to strengthen our relationship with Canada, with whom her district shares the longest length of border in the state. With more than three decades of public service - first as County Clerk and for the past 12 years as a State Senator - Patty Ritchie has truly left her mark, and the people of New York have been well served by her dedicated leadership. On behalf of the Senate Republican Conference and all the people of New York, I want to sincerely thank Senator Ritchie for her many years of service, and wish her all the best in her retirement. | | | | == == == | Leader Rob Ortt Endorses Mark Walczyk for NYS Senate "I am proud to support Mark Walczyk for New York State Senate. His proven record delivering for the North Country and service to our country will make him a valued member of our Senate Republican Conference. We must end radical one-party rule in Albany and restore checks and balances. To do this, we need leaders who are willing to fight back in Albany and be a voice for their constituents back home. I look forward to working with Mark to stop Albany's pro-criminal, pro-tax, pro-mandate agenda. With leaders like Mark, we will get back to serving hardworking families across the state." | | | | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: == == == | | == | | | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with |

name: American Defense News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zncl0q88u5c06r8kv9ljcj54bu8nt1quth6vr6hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim1ob2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tth63g77c9l6cprcspleiq72clm61ge0slgejh32s5kmur63cdke1i6aslmcorjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3aphgeiqr8pti69j39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlcntngljustikedd9fe1vba51kjifm4mhq4j9kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim1ob2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0dkq5qe2v81ohl45tjjt72u4bkis6mv5so44c1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim1ob2c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4mrdifbc7lora5np4er4j9s8373ur7dj48eclpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpim1ob2c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zqgmm4ff7kcgejv98t693hfj65lams1kl4sqp8to).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk5ag0859325ub6cfpg3ke8fojh7c2t7rgp1dng8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1clj6ao71c9h649fg)

name: Great America Update
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6715%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=fmphYPYhsAdKcLfKzX1BkA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69152%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a4AQQQCFzS%2bwFE46DUVn8w&sysid=1) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69153%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cRT%2fCEvrSBgIgkONd0c8Jw&sysid=1 "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69153%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cRT%2fCEvrSBgIgkONd0c8Jw&sysid=1)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69153%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cRT%2fCEvrSBgIgkONd0c8Jw&sysid=1)**
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6715%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=fmphYPYhsAdKcLfKzX1BkA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6715%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=fmphYPYhsAdKcLfKzX1BkA&sysid=1)

---

Friend,

The Biden administration hasn’t even tried to act like they want to secure our Southern Border.

**This has become a serious problem and safety concern for the people of our great nation.**

The Biden administration hasn’t lifted a pinky finger to try to secure our border, and it’s plain to see that they’re not going to start trying any time soon. **They BELIEVE in open borders and BELIEVE that vetting anyone at the border is racist.**

It’s sickening and downright scary for the future of our country. **If you want to see exactly what I think, please take the a couple of minutes to watch exactly what I had to say below.**

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z429nkeb7lh3g0n29pgm0sa92pe39loljkgugcr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cphm4o36cth2bs)
Also, if you have the means, I’d be so incredibly grateful for any contribution you’d like to give so that I have the resources to fight back against my radical opponent who wants to keep our borders as open as a Waffle House at 2 A.M. I need your help if I’m going to have the resources to beat this Nancy Pelosi wannabe.

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: I'm worried, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Please, let me explain
| | |
---
I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, **I'm still falling $7,481 short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment:
**I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the race that will determine Senate control, and****CNN contributors like James Carville have "zero doubt" that I CAN win.**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me _personally._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**

Hello,
Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office.
“Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News.
Well, the first tracker of the campaign has begun showing up to my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.”
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. **And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority.**
And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley!
**I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $10,244 short.**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford before midnight tonight to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42013843/331304779/-42398318?refcode=em20220220am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmRmMzY5Mi01OTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hpicWbLH9WXR_a9QXfSiNEMQDXI4ydotsl0gKx-6C2U=)

I’m running for Senate because I care about the people of Iowa. I want to help Iowans achieve their potential and make our state a leader again in manufacturing, education, and clean energy. And I believe I’ve got the experience to get the job done.
But the only way I can get that message out and correct the lies they’re going to tell about me is with your donation now to my campaign.

body:
The FIRST election of 2022 is just around the corner and House Republican Leaders need your opinion on what the Texas Battleground Strategy should be.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3jfh6--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Patriot,

We are in desperate need of your opinion.

The FIRST election of 2022 is just around the corner and House Republican Leaders need your opinion on what the Texas Battleground Strategy should be.

**[Can you spare a minute of your time to answer a few short questions to help create a strategy before the link expires at MIDNIGHT?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z99v-4qqlpo5/ "Can you spare a minute of your time to answer a few short questions to help create a strategy before the link expires at MIDNIGHT?")**

---
| | | **TEXAS BATTLEGROUND STRATEGY SURVEY

DUE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT**
---
| | **1\. Do you agree that Republicans should focus on securing our southern border?**
---
| | | [AGREE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z99w-4qqlpo6/ "AGREE")
---
| | | [DISAGREE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z99x-4qqlpo7/ "DISAGREE")
---
**2.****Do you agree that Republicans should focus on efforts to cut spending, balance the budget, and reduce the national debt?**
---
| | | [AGREE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z99y-4qqlpo8/ "AGREE")
---
| | | [DISAGREE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z99z-4qqlpo9/ "DISAGREE")
---
**3.** **How important is it to you for Republicans to take back the House and be a check on Joe Biden's radical administration?******
---
| | | [VERY IMPORTANT](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a0-4qqlpo5/ "VERY IMPORTANT")
---
| | | [SOMEWHAT IMPORTANT](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a1-4qqlpo6/ "SOMEWHAT IMPORTANT")
---
| | | [NOT IMPORTANT](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a2-4qqlpo7/ "NOT IMPORTANT")
---
**4.** **How concerned are you about the Radical Left using their majority in Congress to pass a Socialist agenda?******
---
| | | [VERY CONCERNED](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a3-4qqlpo8/ "VERY CONCERNED")
---
| | | [SOMEWHAT CONCERNED](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a4-4qqlpo9/ "SOMEWHAT CONCERNED")
---
| | | [NOT CONCERNED](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a5-4qqlpo0/ "NOT CONCERNED")
---
**5.** **What do you think is the most important issue in 2022?******
---
| | | [THE ECONOMY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a6-4qqlpo1/ "THE ECONOMY")
---
| | | [TAXES](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a7-4qqlpo2/ "TAXES")
---
| | | [CRIME](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a8-4qqlpo3/ "CRIME")
---
| | | [INFLATION](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9a9-4qqlpo4/ "INFLATION")
---
| | | [BORDER SECURITY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9aa-4qqlpo4/ "BORDER SECURITY")
---

This election will set the tone for the rest of 2022. That's why we need a Conservative strategy that is strong enough to win.

We wouldn't be asking if it wasn't important, but as one of our TOP Patriots, we know we can trust you to build a strong America First Strategy.

**[Will you please spare a minute of your time to take this Texas Battleground Survey before MIDNIGHT?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9ab-4qqlpo5/ "Will you please spare a minute of your time to take this Texas Battleground Survey before MIDNIGHT?")**

Thank you,

Texas Battleground Group
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9ac-4qqlpo6/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9ad-4qqlpo7/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jfh6-1z9ae-4qqlpo8/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: NinaTurner.com
subject: Asking for $27 to help build our organizing program
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
neighbor-to-neighbor, friend-to-friend is how we win.
#

Hello Somebody!
This is going to be a very expensive race. Corporate interests and Republican donors are going to spend a LOT of money to try to stop us.
That’s why neighbor-to-neighbor, friend-to-friend organizing is so critical to our campaign’s strategy.
We know that once people hear about our people-first policy platform, like Medicare for All, criminal justice reform and a $15 per hour minimum wage, they’re on board.
But the truth is, it’s _expensive_ to build an organizing operation on this scale, at this speed. And the ONLY way we’re going to be able to reach everyone before Election Day is with your support.
**[Can you make a $27 contribution to our campaign today to ensure we have the resources to fully fund our organizing program? Having more one-on-one conversations with voters is an important part of our strategy to send Nina to Congress, but we need your help to make it happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42017675/331320394/1088907945?refcode2=059796da-5f92-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220220-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk3OTZkYS01ZjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hzzzYcDne5gsBZj69iIXuffzGNmkxMMVlb5ann2H6Oc=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42017679/331320399/1088907945?refcode2=059796da-5f92-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220220-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk3OTZkYS01ZjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hzzzYcDne5gsBZj69iIXuffzGNmkxMMVlb5ann2H6Oc=)**
No candidate can take on the political establishment alone. It’s going to take ALL of us working together to get it done. So thank you for being a part of this people-powered movement for justice.
With these hands,
Nina Turner for Us

That leaves our Democratic Secretaries of State as the last line of defense for voting rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022022_B1_AC_30D]
Rush a donation of $20 ASAP to help our Secretaries hold the line against Trump’s plot to destroy our democracy >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022022_B1_AC_30D]

This is going to be an uphill battle, but we can’t afford to lose hope – our Secretaries are the last line of defense, and if we can re-elect them and defeat the far-right in November, we can save our democracy. subject: 🚨 Voter turnout alert! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.18_email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.18_email]
Have you voted early yet, Peter?
Today is the only Sunday that you'll have a chance to vote. It's also the only day left that you can vote on the weekend. So if you haven’t voted, head to the polls!
It’s being reported that voter turnout is DOWN across the 35th District —so we’re counting on all of our supporters to make a plan to vote. Find your nearest polling place [https://www.texasdemocrats.org/my-texas-votes-2/] and make sure to bring your friends, family, neighbors and coworkers.
Here’s what you should know today:
*
Early
voting
ends
this
Friday,
February
25th

*
Polls
will
be
closed
this
Monday,
February
21st
for
Presidents
Day

*
Election
Day
is
on
March
1st—only
NINE
days
away!
This is it, Peter. If we want to raise wages for workers, protect reproductive rights, and stand up to corporate special interests, then we need to get out the vote NOW. Our campaign is doing everything we can to Get Out The Vote—can we count on you to make a plan to vote today?
>> MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE << [https://www.texasdemocrats.org/my-texas-votes-2/]
Thank you,
Casar HQ
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]

name: Fairness Project
subject: Fulfilling our promises to protect direct democracy >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
When we launched our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign, we made a promise — if we needed to bring litigation, we would litigate. Where we could stop bad laws from being passed, we would run aggressive communications and lobbying campaigns to stop anti-democratic bills. And if a legislature refers suppressive measures to the ballot, we would fight to beat those ballot campaigns. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42022053/331333151/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODY4NWIxOS02ODkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V8iSwdDD-4EBm2QvLvfYxYqxAJw0r_ltglcZYQdpCSU=&emci=e0deeed5-2d90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=b8685b19-6892-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | Team: Our **Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign (BMRC)** has officially been put to the test by South Dakota’s Amendment C, which would significantly restrict voters’ ability to use ballot measures as a tool of direct democracy. When we launched our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign, we made a promise — if we needed to bring litigation, we would litigate. Where we could stop bad laws from being passed, we would run aggressive communications and lobbying campaigns to stop anti-democratic bills. And if a legislature refers suppressive measures to the ballot, we would fight to beat those ballot campaigns. _Of course, we had a plan:_ We’re supporting Democracy Forward as they litigate Amendment C and deploying our network of resources to support their counter-movement. **Still, the fight is far from over._This is where you come in, team._** We’re in need of _additional support_ to continue working alongside the coalition in South Dakota to terminate Amendment C. subject: Got a minute?

body:
Peter —

We know it’s the weekend, so we won’t take up too much of your time. But here’s the situation.

Randolph Bracy is running for Congress to protect our majority, fight back against the GOP, and deliver real results for our community. And he needs your help.

Can you chip in $25 right now to help him win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=0220fr]

It’s no secret that the Democrats’ House majority is in jeopardy this year, and Florida’s 10th Congressional District could make all the difference.

We need to elect a leader who will always fight for us — a leader who knows how to win the tough battles and push for progress no matter what. Randolph Bracy is that leader.

If you’re with us in the fight to protect our majority, keep the GOP out of power, and deliver for our community, click here to chip in $25 and support Randolph Bracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=0220fr]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Bracy

body:
This campaign is worth fighting for!
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42022285/331333911/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk704-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGZiN2VmMi02ODkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=862gQ0liJPpIzJ3eySVkWpFZ683QN360Tvu_73lHH9E=)
Peter – it's Abby. Can I have just one minute of your time to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa?
There are a million reasons why this campaign is worth fighting for, but let me share just a few of the ones that are most on my mind right now:
This campaign is worth fighting for because polling has revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley.
**This campaign is worth fighting for because, right now, Sen. Grassley is also facing a RECORD-HIGH disapproval rating.**
This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind.
This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – _nobody –_ will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.
I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Thanks to your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Thanks to you, we're going to _defeat_ Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority.
I don't want to sugarcoat things, though. Starting off the year on the right foot is crucial for this campaign. So, if you share my belief that this campaign is worth fighting for, can you make a contribution right now?
**[Donate $5 or more right now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority. Every donation gets us that much closer to flipping this seat blue, so please chip in whatever you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42022286/331333912/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk704-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGZiN2VmMi02ODkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=862gQ0liJPpIzJ3eySVkWpFZ683QN360Tvu_73lHH9E=)**

clean_body: This campaign is worth fighting for! | | | = Peter – it's Abby. Can I have just one minute of your time to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa? There are a million reasons why this campaign is worth fighting for, but let me share just a few of the ones that are most on my mind right now: This campaign is worth fighting for because polling has revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley. This campaign is worth fighting for because, right now, Sen. Grassley is also facing a RECORD-HIGH disapproval rating. This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind. This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – nobody – will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority. I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Thanks to your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Thanks to you, we're going to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority. I don't want to sugarcoat things, though. Starting off the year on the right foot is crucial for this campaign. So, if you share my belief that this campaign is worth fighting for, can you make a contribution right now? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all that you do. | | Hi Friend, This is a long update but it is very important, so I hope you'll give me a minute of your Sunday. In his effort to court the ultra-conservatives, Sec. Frank LaRose has abandoned his commitment to democracy. I am sure this has been clear to you and it is clear to some Republicans too. We have seen Republicans join our campaign because we have the only candidate that puts democracy above partisanship. This week Sec. Frank LaRose saw it too. Sec. Frank LaRose faced trouble getting endorsed for reelection due to his extreme actions. However, because LaRose is a Trump henchman the the ultra-conservatives who run the Ohio Republican Party bailed him out. While Sec. Frank LaRose is courting the far-right Trump loyalists, we will continue to build our team with you! We knew the Trump loyalists would pour in resources to protect the investment they made in a Secretary of State who "helped deliver more votes for President Trump than ever before". Now is a critical time in the campaign where we must build our infrastructure to reach voters in every corner of Ohio, before the Trump machine floods the airwaves with their lies. We recently hired additional staff and need to expand our fundraising to cover the new expenses. To do this I raise our February goal from our online fundraising to $15,000. name: Team Nikki
subject: Cruel. Immoral. Inhumane.
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

We want to make sure you saw Nikki’s email.

On Wednesday night, the Florida GOP managed something they’ve been trying for years. They passed a deeply restrictive 15-week abortion ban through the House that makes no exception for rape, incest, or human trafficking.

This bill is cruel. It’s immoral. And it’s inhumane. It victimizes women already suffering from the worst kinds of trauma. It takes away women’s bodily autonomy. It spits in the face of 50 years of advancements in women’s rights.

And now, it's headed to the Senate.

But Nikki’s right — no matter what the GOP does, no matter how many privileged men vote to take women’s rights away, Florida women are going to keep fighting back. And we can start by electing the first woman Governor of Florida. Click here to chip in $5 and help make it happen. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-feb-2022?refcode=218hb5]

If Nikki were in the Governor’s office right now, we wouldn’t need to think twice about HB 5. Whether it passed through the legislature or not, we could rest easy, knowing that the person holding the veto pen is someone with compassion, empathy, and a commitment to upholding women’s rights.

We can’t say the same for DeSantis. Or for someone who flip flopped on this issue like former Republican Charlie Crist.

So we’re asking you, Peter — can you chip in $5 today to help protect women’s rights and elect Florida’s first woman Governor? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-feb-2022?refcode=218hb5]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Nikki

-------- Begin Forwarded Message --------
From: Nikki Fried
Date: Thu, Feb 17, 2022 at 11:21 AM
Subject: Last night, we were attacked

Peter,

In case you were sleeping last night, the Florida GOP voted to take away women’s freedom.

By a margin of 78 to 39 — almost entirely along party lines — the Florida House passed HB 5, a bill that bans nearly all abortions after 15 weeks. This came after they voted down amendments that would have made exceptions for cases of rape and incest.

We knew this was coming, but that doesn’t make it any less infuriating to watch women’s rights being taken away before our eyes.

But here’s the thing, Peter: Try as they might, the GOP can’t change the fact that women in Florida know our rights. We recognize our fundamental right to make our own medical decisions. And we won’t stop fighting for that right until we’ve defeated Governor DeSantis and ended the GOP’s one-party rule over our state.

Help us win the fight for abortion rights and the fight for a free Florida. Click here to rush a $5 donation and fight back against HB 5. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-feb-2022?refcode=218hb5]

For decades, the GOP has insisted that the battle over abortion rights was about morals or “family values.” But we know that’s not true. If it was, they wouldn't have voted down exceptions for rape or incest.

This is about control, Peter. This is about controlling women’s bodies and reminding us that, ultimately, our choices aren’t our own. This is about a room full of men telling us what we can and can’t do, no matter the circumstances. No matter how much it hurts us.

But if I know one thing, it’s that women in Florida aren’t going to sit back and let them get away with this. No matter how long it takes, we’re going to fight, and together, we’re going to win. If you’re with me in this fight, click here to chip in $5 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-feb-2022?refcode=218hb5]

Thank you for standing with me.

— Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6fccc948-8091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/5e7b9659-6a92-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTdiOTY1OS02YTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1may7ZkapQFQGJ2COKievXnHVVm5I9GOX6GdImMgM8=&id=116879433 .

Peter,

Alex is running because for over a decade, Wisconsinites have had only one Senator fighting for them in Washington.

Alex wants to give Tammy Baldwin a true partner in Washington to put money back in the pockets of hard working Wisconsinites and bring some real change and real results for the people of Wisconsin. He has a proven track record of delivering for the people of Wisconsin – whether it’s creating good union jobs, paying a $15-dollar minimum wage, fighting for social justice, or making it more accessible for people to register to vote.

**_He didn’t just talk about the issues, he delivered on them._**

In both urban and rural areas, people across Wisconsin are struggling with many of the same issues. Whether it is inadequate access to affordable healthcare, unsafe drinking water, a lack of access to high-speed broadband, crumbling infrastructure, educational challenges, or vanishing economic opportunity, our communities need help.

Alex wants to go to the Senate to get real results for Wisconsin. He will fight every day to bring back resources to our state and deliver legislation that will help Wisconsinites in their everyday lives.

clean_body: Alex is running because for over a decade, Wisconsinites have had only one Senator fighting for them in Washington. | | = Peter, Alex is running because for over a decade, Wisconsinites have had only one Senator fighting for them in Washington. Alex wants to give Tammy Baldwin a true partner in Washington to put money back in the pockets of hard working Wisconsinites and bring some real change and real results for the people of Wisconsin. He has a proven track record of delivering for the people of Wisconsin – whether it’s creating good union jobs, paying a $15-dollar minimum wage, fighting for social justice, or making it more accessible for people to register to vote. He didn’t just talk about the issues, he delivered on them. In both urban and rural areas, people across Wisconsin are struggling with many of the same issues. Whether it is inadequate access to affordable healthcare, unsafe drinking water, a lack of access to high-speed broadband, crumbling infrastructure, educational challenges, or vanishing economic opportunity, our communities need help. Alex wants to go to the Senate to get real results for Wisconsin. He will fight every day to bring back resources to our state and deliver legislation that will help Wisconsinites in their everyday lives. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. * Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority.
* A record 30 Democrats have retired so far.
* This cycle, we have some of the best GOP candidates I’ve ever seen.

Esther Joy King (IL-17)
Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
Wesley Hunt (TX-38)
Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jg4t-1z9mr-4qqlpo4/)
---

* 5 seats to take back the house
* 30 Dem retirements
* 8 tier 1 candidates who will crush their competition.

**The numbers are good.**

But we have one problem: These candidates need resources to go up against the liberal money machine.

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jg4t-1z9ms-4qqlpo5/)
---

As Republican Leader of the House, I am begging- will you chip in $10, $20, or anything you can give to help us ensure victory in the 2022 midterms? I will personally match every dollar you give for the next hour:

---

---

Thank you,

| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3jg4t-1z9mu-4qqlpo7/)

Leader Kevin McCarthy

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track.
