name: Congresswoman Demings
subject: Please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me
| | |
---
I won't lie to you, friend. We're fighting an uphill battle right now. Let me explain:
_**FIRST,**_ Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.
_**THEN,**_ polling showed me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so national Republicans poured millions into Florida to stack the cards against me.
_**NOW,**_ Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me – and I'm falling dangerously short of my $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal. I need to make up the difference before midnight, friend.
Republicans are trying to buy this seat – no matter how much money it takes – and I desperately need more resources right now to compete with Rubio.
The last Florida Senate race was determined by _just_ over 10,000 votes, and my race is shaping up to be JUST as close. That means it could be YOUR single donation that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians and reach out to just enough voters to win.
**[Please, friend, will you donate $5 to help me meet my midnight goal, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority? Every dollar counts at this critical moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42024144/331341689/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2461-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2JmZWUzOC02ZjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZG0M2KFCGfWOjY7Pljs_Pwt1P06I2eLxC4HRwg3zCPY=)**

NOW, Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me – and I'm falling dangerously short of my $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal. I need to make up the difference before midnight, friend. Republicans are trying to buy this seat – no matter how much money it takes – and I desperately need more resources right now to compete with Rubio. The last Florida Senate race was determined by just over 10,000 votes, and my race is shaping up to be JUST as close. That means it could be YOUR single donation that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians and reach out to just enough voters to win. = Thank you, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ed=20Thelander=20for=20Congress?=
subject: In Case You Missed It! Ed Thelander on WGAN with Matt Gagnon
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
Ed joined host Matt Gagnon on Friday morning to discuss his successful effort to get on the ballot, and other burning issues of the day. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b046ddde8952/a-strong-finish-to-8851046?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=5f35b1a70e&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| |
> | | | On Friday Ed spoke with Matt Gagnon on [WGAN.com](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=9a102643b0&e=f8a0a76a2b), discussing the huge volunteer effort that successfully put him on the ballot for the race for Maine's 1st Congressional District.
>
> Currently, Ed is the ONLY candidate on the ballot, and, as usual, his opponent is nowhere to be seen.
>
> If you missed the live broadcast, click on the image below to listen to the podcast. | [](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=963e87a8c3&e=f8a0a76a2b)
> * * *
> **As the first Maine citizen to file their signatures in Maine’s First Congressional District for the 2022 election, Ed’s campaign demonstrated broad support, collecting the maximum number of signatures allowed, in record time! Over 100 volunteers gathered signatures in 94 cities and towns that make up the Congressional District.**
>
> _**If you haven't donated to Ed's campaign yet, now is the time to step up!**_
>
> **Your donation of $25, $50, $100, or even more, will help Ed defeat the entrenched progressive who has failed to represent Maine people and Maine values for nearly 14 years.
>
> Click on the image below to make your donation now, and make 2022 the year we see an unprecedented Red Wave this November!**
> * * *
> [](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=41adb9f4c2&e=f8a0a76a2b)
> ---
> * * *
> _“It has been a humbling experience and a great privilege to talk with the people of the First District. Their concerns and challenges are the same concerns and challenges of people all over our country.
>
> I served our nation in uniform for 21 years. I know what it’s like to meet challenges head-on and overcome them. Now I am asking for your help to face the challenge of defeating a very well-financed incumbent. Together, we can return common sense and integrity to the office that represents Maine in Washington." _\- Ed

clean_body: Ed joined host Matt Gagnon on Friday morning to discuss his successful effort to get on the ballot, and other burning issues of the day. | | | | | | | | | | On Friday Ed spoke with Matt Gagnon on , discussing the huge volunteer effort that successfully put him on the ballot for the race for Maine's 1st Congressional District. Currently, Ed is the ONLY candidate on the ballot, and, as usual, his opponent is nowhere to be seen. If you missed the live broadcast, click on the image below to listen to the podcast. | As the first Maine citizen to file their signatures in Maine’s First Congressional District for the 2022 election, Ed’s campaign demonstrated broad support, collecting the maximum number of signatures allowed, in record time! Over 100 volunteers gathered signatures in 94 cities and towns that make up the Congressional District. If you haven't donated to Ed's campaign yet, now is the time to step up! Your donation of $25, $50, $100, or even more, will help Ed defeat the entrenched progressive who has failed to represent Maine people and Maine values for nearly 14 years. Click on the image below to make your donation now, and make 2022 the year we see an unprecedented Red Wave this November! --- “It has been a humbling experience and a great privilege to talk with the people of the First District. Their concerns and challenges are the same concerns and challenges of people all over our country. I served our nation in uniform for 21 years. I know what it’s like to meet challenges head-on and overcome them. Now I am asking for your help to face the challenge of defeating a very well-financed incumbent. Together, we can return common sense and integrity to the office that represents Maine in Washington." \- Ed | "Please Donate Here" | Ed Thelander is a United States Navy veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not constitute or imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc. | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@thelanderforcongress.com | | | | Copyright © 2022 Committee to elect Ed Thelander for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: They're stealing the elections...AGAIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter:

**You won't believe how Democrats are trying to steal the next election...** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59679204:W-oU-fHN7:m:1:2365227053:59F1ED1DF604D4462AAF253DA9CBF7AD:r) _Liberal cities like New York just granted illegal aliens the right to vote_.

Illegal aliens casting ballots cancels out the right of American citizens like you to decide elections.

I will not let this stand.

**I'm leading the fight in Congress to DEFUND any city or state where communist Democrats try to rig elections by granting illegal aliens voting rights.**

But I need to know if you are with me.

**[Can I count on you to chip in a contribution of $10, $25, or $50 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59679204:W-oU-fHN7:m:1:2365227053:59F1ED1DF604D4462AAF253DA9CBF7AD:r)?** [_**CHIP IN TO HELP MTG FIGHT BACK!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59679204:W-oU-fHN7:m:1:2365227053:59F1ED1DF604D4462AAF253DA9CBF7AD:r) I need your help.

**Democrats, Never Trumpers like Liz Cheney, George Soros, and the Hollywood elite dumped millions into my race to defeat me.**

The swamp may pour as much as 20 million dollars into my district to install another pliable puppet that will rubber-stamp Nancy Pelosi and the Jihad Squad's socialist, hate-America agenda.

I called out the fraud in 2020.

I know Democrats stole that election.

**_And I will not let Democrats steal anymore by stuffing the ballot box with illegal alien voters._**

Because I'm leading this fight...

As well as leading the fight to impeach Joe Biden...

Suing Nancy Pelosi for her mask mandates...

Demanding Congress investigate and FIRE Fauci...

Insiders packed my district with 30,000 new Democrat voters.

**And now, my Communist Democrat opponent is raising millions of dollars from the same establishment that spent four years staging a coup against Donald Trump.**

This is the real insurrection.

And I need your help to fight back.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59679204:W-oU-fHN7:m:1:2365227053:59F1ED1DF604D4462AAF253DA9CBF7AD:r).**

Peter, not only am I facing some of the most well-funded Democrats in the country...

...now I have to get through a tough Primary against a Liz Cheney/Adam Kinzinger type "Republican" who will have MILLIONS of dollars behind her...

**All of them will spend TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars in negative attack ads, smear campaigns, and dirty tricks to defeat me in 2022.**

If I don't have the resources to fight back, I could be in real trouble.

I know you have been with me from day one.

I ran for office because I'm a conservative outsider like President Trump.

And I say only American citizens should decide elections.

**_NO ILLEGAL ALIENS VOTING!_**

Can I count on you in this fight?

**[If you want to stop the Communist Democrats from stealing elections with illegal aliens voting please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59679204:W-oU-fHN7:m:1:2365227053:59F1ED1DF604D4462AAF253DA9CBF7AD:r).**

Together you and I can stop communism and save America. [_**CHIP IN TO HELP MTG FIGHT BACK!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59679204:W-oU-fHN7:m:1:2365227053:59F1ED1DF604D4462AAF253DA9CBF7AD:r) Sincerely,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

---

Folks, We don’t like to beg for donations or use scare tactics like “the sky is falling” when we ask for your support. You’re as much a part of this team as the staff here at headquarters, and the work it takes to keep Colorado blue and defend Michael’s seat is deeply personal. This grassroots team is made up of staff members, generous grassroots donors, and loyal supporters and we’re all here for the same reasons:
* We believe that every child should have a fighting chance, no matter where they grow up.
* We know that climate change is an urgent threat to our way of life and that we have the power to fight it.
* We believe health care should be affordable and no one should be one illness away from losing all they’ve worked for.
* We believe we should leave our democracy stronger for the next generation.
* And we know Michael refuses to accept that our economy and democracy are too broken to fix and he always puts Colorado first over partisan games.

This campaign is about building on Michael’s progress delivering for Coloradans. We don’t need to use scare tactics when the reality of Mitch McConnell leading the Senate into a legislative graveyard is still a recent memory. As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. name: American Defense News
subject: Make a powerful difference for American freedom
body:
You and I must fight hard to stop Joe Biden and the left from utterly ruining our country. Here’s your chance to make a power
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf9r5kf6g5g5r73o9nl1er68cfr3jlvi1e4lf5lo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrrbdpjm8pn4tr1cqrm4cll6lqr6clkmdr77cj0eoon9cdkm9qr8djmclrb9or7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6lj30tpl61jrcoj662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5imco70c1h68oh5u)
Here’s your chance to make a powerful difference in this fight for freedom. And make your gift go twice as far!
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6s2qm6h763s9nfc5j1d927vth1ebfhi10f88rug_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpge0o32chh2bs)
Fellow Conservative, You and I must fight hard to stop Joe Biden and the left from utterly ruining our country. **Here’s your chance to make a powerful difference in this fight for freedom. And make your gift go twice as far!** You can do it by supporting the**Leadership Institute.** I’m Morton Blackwell, president of the Leadership Institute. This organization provides the “boot camp” training for America’s conservative movement. My team trains candidates, campaigners, citizens, and students to take on the left -- **and win.** Backed by generous friends just like you, my Leadership Institute:
* **Builds conservative student groups** on campuses across the country
* **Activates conservative student journalists** to document and report leftist abuses at college campuses
* **Trains conservatives to run for school board seats** and stop leftists from indoctrinating more children
* And **teaches principled conservatives how to run for** \-- **and win** \-- elections at the local, state, and congressional level
The Leadership Institute gets results. But we know we must do a whole lot more to save America from the left’s onslaught. [ **Yes, I'd like to help save America** ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjftsmr9uhjtl0c6ef452q14obk8d2sj49uapv0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpge0o32chh2bs) As I look at the enormous challenges our country faces right now, I am determined to increase the size, impact, and effectiveness of the Leadership Institute’s programs. [**In fact -- I aim to double them during the next three years.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmt290vftrfjsoms3rml3sb37sogo72gv7pns2tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpge0o32chh2bs)** The Leadership Institute’s programs have proven successful. And they are scalable, meaning you and I can invest more in what works to produce even greater results. **That’s why I’m so glad to report that something extraordinary just happened.** One generous LI supporter is excited by my plans to double the Leadership Institute’s programs. So excited, in fact, that **she gave us the means to help fire up her fellow conservatives.** [**Thanks to her generosity, whatever you give today will be matched -- dollar-for-dollar -- up to $500,000.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu95daelhf6trt3uqof463pqmu25v2a20ulk9rf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpge0o32chh2bs) **So please, rush your contribution to the Leadership Institute today, and help me make the most of this extraordinary opportunity.** To accomplish that goal, she’s committed to match donations up to $500,000 if I can find more friends like you to donate. This dear friend believes so strongly in our work that she has invested in the Leadership Institute for 39 years. Now, with everything on the line for our country -- and leftists on a rampage -- she’s determined to take the Leadership Institute’s training efforts to the next level. [**This is your chance to double your giving -- and double the Leadership Institute’s crucial training between now and 2024.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeaf0nkjtimk8p6pestla2mj1502lopmk0faoeog_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpge0o32chh2bs) Opportunities like this don’t come along very often. With freedom under attack like never before in our lifetimes, with government power growing to stunning heights, with corporate and cultural pressure uniting against conservatives -- **this is the time for bold action.** [**Please make your most generous donation before midnight on Monday, February 28th to help the Leadership Institute double its crucial training programs. Your gift today will be matched by that generous LI donor.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbaecbk05g5aapvp19it5i10h8m79b1usm0octe8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpge0o32chh2bs) It’s time you and I take this fight to the left -- and stop their radical socialist agenda. Please [**click here**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6pfbs6d9bhgiq20n29pt94icbu4a3dtve8mtt4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpge0o32chh2bs) to give through the Leadership Institute’s secure giving website. Thank you for your dedication to our great nation, and for helping me double these crucial training programs for tomorrow’s conservative leaders. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute [ **Yes, I want my gift to be matched today** ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztkikvnatq0bg1clcq06i1hqvb4kfop34jmj5nlo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpge0o32chh2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

Backed by generous friends just like you, my Leadership Institute: Builds conservative student groups on campuses across the country Activates conservative student journalists to document and report leftist abuses at college campuses Trains conservatives to run for school board seats and stop leftists from indoctrinating more children And teaches principled conservatives how to run for \-- and win \-- elections at the local, state, and congressional level The Leadership Institute gets results. But we know we must do a whole lot more to save America from the left’s onslaught. As I look at the enormous challenges our country faces right now, I am determined to increase the size, impact, and effectiveness of the Leadership Institute’s programs. The Leadership Institute’s programs have proven successful. And they are scalable, meaning you and I can invest more in what works to produce even greater results. That’s why I’m so glad to report that something extraordinary just happened. One generous LI supporter is excited by my plans to double the Leadership Institute’s programs. So excited, in fact, that she gave us the means to help fire up her fellow conservatives. So please, rush your contribution to the Leadership Institute today, and help me make the most of this extraordinary opportunity. To accomplish that goal, she’s committed to match donations up to $500,000 if I can find more friends like you to donate. This dear friend believes so strongly in our work that she has invested in the Leadership Institute for 39 years. Now, with everything on the line for our country -- and leftists on a rampage -- she’s determined to take the Leadership Institute’s training efforts to the next level. Opportunities like this don’t come along very often. With freedom under attack like never before in our lifetimes, with government power growing to stunning heights, with corporate and cultural pressure uniting against conservatives -- this is the time for bold action. It’s time you and I take this fight to the left -- and stop their radical socialist agenda. Please to give through the Leadership Institute’s secure giving website. Thank you for your dedication to our great nation, and for helping me double these crucial training programs for tomorrow’s conservative leaders. Cordially, Morton C. Blackwell** President, Leadership Institute | | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42031396/331351159/-420428835?refcode=20220220_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRmNzQ0ZS03ODkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Ek3P3B5HCmyE7oaGDix03d3jxtsXSzbjlUQgP-oIIo=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42031397/331351160/-392698372?refcode=20220220_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRmNzQ0ZS03ODkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Ek3P3B5HCmyE7oaGDix03d3jxtsXSzbjlUQgP-oIIo=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42031398/331351161/-420428835?refcode=20220220_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRmNzQ0ZS03ODkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Ek3P3B5HCmyE7oaGDix03d3jxtsXSzbjlUQgP-oIIo=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. clean_body: | | | = Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at POLITICO say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal. So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:= = As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat. That's why we have to fight back now – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. | Peter,

[_**In a moment, we’re going to ask you to make a contribution to Josh’s campaign for Congress. clean_body: It’s a ruff dog-eat-dog world out there... but I know if there’s anyone who can really make a difference, it’s my dad, Doug. | | Hi friends, It's your good friend Jack, back again! Did you miss me? I got my internet privileges taken away for a little cuz I kept buying myself too many treats online, but can a good dog ever have TOO many treats? Anywayz... back to business. I'm here to remind you that it's National Love Your Pet Day! | If you have a furry friend at home, be sure to order them all the treats they deserve today! (Maybe just don't overdo it and order 52 boxes like I did one time...) My dad loves Maryland almost as much as he loves me (which is A LOT) and I've been watching him work super hard to build as strong of a campaign as PAWsible! As an important member of my dad's campaign team, I've been all over the state with him as he's chatted with voters about a safer, stronger, and more just Maryland. He's an awesome dad, and he'll be an amazing governor -- but he can't do it alone! He needs your help, friends. It's a ruff dog-eat-dog world out there... but I know if there's anyone who can really make a difference, it's my dad, Doug. From the goodest boy, Jack the dog | By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. name: Matt West
subject: We can’t accept this:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
| Friend, let’s talk about the homeless crisis. According to the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development, **_“more than 326,000 people experienced sheltered homelessness in the U.S. on a single night in 2021.”_** And the worst part? **Oregon is ranked 7th worst in the nation for most homeless Americans.** As OR-06’s next member of Congress, I can’t accept that. It’s no secret that the rising costs in rent, inadequate housing supply, the COVID-19 pandemic, and racial inequality are some of the biggest contributing factors to the unhoused today. But that’s why it’s so important for Congress to get it together and pass critical legislation — such as the Build Back Better Act — to invest MORE in our communities. It’s time to get real and fight back against the corporate-backed politicians who stand in the way of progress. But I can’t do this alone. **_[I am running for Congress because we need more progressive fighters who will fight for EVERY American in Washington. Chip in whatever you can to help me get the job clean_body: | Friend, let’s talk about the homeless crisis. According to the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development, “more than 326,000 people experienced sheltered homelessness in the U.S. on a single night in 2021.” And the worst part? Oregon is ranked 7th worst in the nation for most homeless Americans. As OR-06’s next member of Congress, I can’t accept that. It’s no secret that the rising costs in rent, inadequate housing supply, the COVID-19 pandemic, and racial inequality are some of the biggest contributing factors to the unhoused today. But that’s why it’s so important for Congress to get it together and pass critical legislation — such as the Build Back Better Act — to invest MORE in our communities. It’s time to get real and fight back against the corporate-backed politicians who stand in the way of progress. But I can’t do this alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let's do this. Friend, I wanted to send along an important update in our campaign to replace Madison Cawthorn in Western North Carolina.

As you may recall, the NC Supreme Court recently threw out the Republicans' gerrymandered congressional maps. On Friday, the General Assembly passed NEW maps that are now headed back to the courts for review.

It's frustrating that Republicans have stretched this process out for so long, and it's possible that we'll be left with only a few short months to campaign before ballots are cast in the June primary.

**Despite the uncertainty, it's critical that we continue building a strong, issues-focused campaign. We won’t give up in our shared fight to ensure working families have a shot at good-paying jobs and safe, affordable housing.**

**[We're counting on another 201 donations before midnight to maintain our fundraising pace. As you may recall, the NC Supreme Court recently threw out the Republicans' gerrymandered congressional maps. On Friday, the General Assembly passed NEW maps that are now headed back to the courts for review. It's frustrating that Republicans have stretched this process out for so long, and it's possible that we'll be left with only a few short months to campaign before ballots are cast in the June primary. Despite the uncertainty, it's critical that we continue building a strong, issues-focused campaign. We won’t give up in our shared fight to ensure working families have a shot at good-paying jobs and safe, affordable housing. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This district could very well be favorable for Democrats, so we need to lay the groundwork right now to reach critical swing voters and counter the onslaught of attacks coming from our GOP opponents. name: Connor Boyack
subject: Investigation into schools reveals radical trends
body:
Parents are getting more involved in their children’s education than ever before. And there’s a discovery happening — scho
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsr00rol7s156fam06r3sbqm7lghi7iqciecstpo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfecrhmjj3ep5jmgpjep9mc9i3ed30ephj8o9l64pn0opgehpnfd74eth75cpmcsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9ddm6urm6phh6apm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgmapj0sphmcp724no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7d1n4fq19d9v20urcm1jgbr30pcb868fot4tgmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgecor6cjh2bs)

Friend,

Parents are getting more involved in their children's education than ever before. And there's a discovery happening -- schools are indoctrinating children with radical ideologies.

Here are the special "Equity" month curriculum for a public school in Evanston, IL.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs3ocut50j1icd4enfagm0emun3a1r1babsc5lgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgecor6cjh2bs)

This is being taught to students as young as pre-k!

Kudos to the school for being transparent. And if parents want this type of education, then so be it.

But I saw the writing on the wall 10 years ago. That's why I created the Tuttle Twins.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Connor Boyack. I'm the author of the Tuttle Twins books. The Tuttle Twins is a freedom-focused educational series that teaches kids about the ideas of individual liberty, limited government, rule of law, logic, and free-market economics.

I am emailing you with a call to action to fight back against radical indoctrination.

[_**Can you donate $250, $100, $50, or $10 to distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to schools, libraries, and families? Click here to donate >>

Donate $10 for 1 Book >>
Donate $20 for 2 Books >>
Donate $50 for 5 Books >>
Donate $100 for 10 Books >>
Donate $250 for 25 Books >>
Donate $1,000 for 100 Books >>
Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoj0dluo2s3o9ph5l358qvpnpiua3fhtkr4huph0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgecor6cjh2bs)

_**As a bonus, all online donations are being matched by one of our biggest supporters, John P. You can double your impact! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5n4hd80o383krnfq7jua4rlc31ms075big58isg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgecor6cjh2bs)

**Over 3 MILLION copies have been distributed!**

I want my children to have books they enjoy while also learning about these important ideas that made America the greatest country in the world. I want the same for the children in your life! Your children, grandchildren, and kids in your community need your help today.

Let's introduce 1,000 students to liberty this month by sending them a copy of the Tuttle Twins.

[_**It costs roughly $10 to send a book to a family. Can you donate $10 or more to help introduce liberty to 1,000 students? Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3gjpk94vgqie2aqndqbvpo534ijkuk5dbasgi10_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgecor6cjh2bs)

Here's how it works.

Libertas Institute distributes copies of the Tuttle Twins to students and families across the country, giving kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.

Families and educators actively teach their kids about the ideas of freedom and responsibility after receiving our books in the mail.

In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [_**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrb42g1u9lr7iie1lra31hj42aegfniiubfo93ko_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgecor6cjh2bs)

Socialism will not be fully defeated with bans or at the ballot box. None of that will matter unless kids are offered positive alternatives that teach the ideas of liberty.

I am humbly asking you to donate $10 or more to distribute a copy of the Tuttle Twins to a family, school, or library. Each $10 raised distributes a single book.

Please use a link below to donate:

[_**Donate $10 for 1 Book >>
Donate $20 for 2 Books >>
Donate $50 for 5 Books >>
Donate $100 for 10 Books >>
Donate $250 for 25 Books >>
Donate $1,000 for 100 Books >>
Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4r380nh2cr3rsdefplmvubj5fohh1gsolbf8hoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgecor6cjh2bs)

_**Remember: all online donations are being matched by one of our biggest supporters, John P. You can double your impact! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***_

You can be the reason a kid is introduced to liberty instead of socialism. It is up to us to create pro-liberty and pro-free market educational content.

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
President, Libertas Institute
Author, Tuttle Twins

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zc45861a0o726u08h42fok6ipdersiuo1hf4v178).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z02lcrru5b6ik7fhqmd1ibciqss5url5gkpr2gcg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgecor6cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Beto for Texas
subject: You’ve been selected to respond to Team Beto’s Election Year Strategy Survey →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Your response would mean a lot.
#
Hey,
Beto really wants to hear from folks like you about our strategy to fire Greg Abbott and win in Texas — which is why we’re asking you to represent PA in our official Strategy Survey.
**Will you take a minute to respond to our February Election Year Strategy Survey, starting with the question below?**
[Greg Abbott is already dropping millions on TV and radio ads. Our campaign is focused on Beto traveling across the state to reach every voter, including Republicans, Independents, and folks who’ve never voted before.](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/EY-strategy-survey_feb/?source=ema20220220-176944&t=1&akid=176944%2E444211%2E5hbR7g) [Do you agree that focusing on outreach and organizing is the best way to fight back against Abbott’s ad blitz?](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/EY-strategy-survey_feb/?source=ema20220220-176944&t=2&akid=176944%2E444211%2E5hbR7g) Select an answer: Yes No Not sure **[Finish the survey →](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/EY-strategy-survey_feb/?source=ema20220220-176944&t=3&akid=176944%2E444211%2E5hbR7g)**
---
With your help, we will elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott this year, but we need to be clear-eyed about the challenges that lie ahead. Abbott has amassed over $62 million in campaign cash, and his corporate donors will spend whatever it takes to protect their power.
Right now, we’re planning our next round of travel, hiring more organizing staff, and setting our budget for the rest of this campaign. There’s no better time to get feedback from supporters like you on how we’re investing our time and energy.
[**Click here to complete Team Beto’s official Election Year Strategy Survey →**](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/EY-strategy-survey_feb/?source=ema20220220-176944&t=4&akid=176944%2E444211%2E5hbR7g)
Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot.
More soon,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220220-176944-footer&t=5&refcode2=176944_444211_5hbR7g&akid=176944%2E444211%2E5hbR7g)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=6&akid=176944%2E444211%2E5hbR7g)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=176944%2E444211%2E5hbR7g)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Our very first volunteer kickoff!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
I have some amazing news to share. Yesterday, our campaign hosted our very first volunteer kickoff call. **We were joined by over 80 amazing friends and supporters from all over the country!** Together, we talked about our big picture goals and what we think it will take to win this race and flip California’s 23rd district from red to blue.
This is what organizing a movement looks like. **Victorious progressive campaigns and red to blue races have some important things in common: major resources, a committed base of supporters, and an incredibly strong, organized ground game.** That’s what we’re building toward.
I was so inspired by all the faces and the energy on this call. For a whole year, we’ve been grinding hard to raise funds and prove we have what it takes. **Now, the endorsements are rolling in and we’re building a formidable base to take on Republican Jay Obernotle and win this seat. **
**[If you can’t volunteer but want to support, donations are the best way to help us out. Every month, our fundraising goals increase to match the programs we’re beginning to run up to Election Day. Will you chip in our average donation of $30 and help us reach our February goal? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42037632/331362254/-431919476?refcode=2-20&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzdkZWRhZC04NzkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TERmgE0TeiM6OXKUDUAzm0t6nmPf80w_ALI0mpjGNQc=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42037634/331362256/-431919476?refcode=2-20&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzdkZWRhZC04NzkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TERmgE0TeiM6OXKUDUAzm0t6nmPf80w_ALI0mpjGNQc=)

And let’s be honest. My opponent Jay Obernolte doesn’t have to worry about organizing voters, he just throws his own wealth into the race and calls it a day. But we don’t shy away from a fight on this campaign. **We’re going to work twice as hard as the opposition to make sure we reach every Democratic voter in this district and motivate them to turn out. ******
**[Our call yesterday was just the beginning. If you’re ready to keep building this successful movement, then I’m asking you to help out today and chip in our average amount of just $30. Can I count on you? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42037640/331362259/-431919476?refcode=2-20&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzdkZWRhZC04NzkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TERmgE0TeiM6OXKUDUAzm0t6nmPf80w_ALI0mpjGNQc=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Just making sure you saw this
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
In case you missed it, this is a reminder that you have been selected to participate in my campaign’s Official 2022 Issues Survey.
We have a historic opportunity to change the way that government does business – and I want to make sure that grassroots supporters like you have my ear at every step of the process. I’m building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and your direct engagement is crucial in helping shape the future that we’ll build together.
From making Maryland the first net zero state, to creating 100,000 new family-supporting jobs, to achieving statewide 5G, and much more, we’re going to transform Maryland into the leading state in the nation. Let me know what issues are most important to you!
My survey will only take a minute, but will provide my campaign with important information that will help us better serve Marylanders under my gubernatorial administration. Click here to take our Official 2022 Issues Survey. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BC_KijWRCUa7vG4y46E1mA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!

So please, Peter, will you make a contribution today to help us fend off Cuellar’s attacks and propel our GOTV efforts?**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCaU_9IkaZi8joLNHt4nUuvlQhA4ekp_kb1j0tZu6dzYDxzatu4Laa8daqVxqfH_NJe5jxxyupNwPrqbIuD4TfTIVWKCWWqHtIbsjiwk9pZ_hjqvvj7mzaeo_C2TgBjocBaxBdWaSXzPmQqCU8miV5CGzTfsHcsHGdQ_uxfNmYBGqXagWxgh-5wfwUzlqza3OFRtLjuYOhJhf4CZH4yaQvu11o4HuRMTf8Fpg9WUKlnYmVeP0KC_NQxGNqQT4RgqdPclXoy32VuZbRmMjEKVxWWM0MBCOvkuFMetKrGMPN1wO2Z8al-h1GkO3qoCKjYJ54dxsPW2b-twztmA1MQAvC0RaCXgurI8ZK7QuzSrq0myw/3jq/CaMztz1JSdaD7IQN9FB19g/h1/nW5uQEDRIegGdKK-2WOwIy-_JTLgLEsuJdCKDMsGtB8) [Rush a contribution »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCaU_9IkaZi8joLNHt4nUuvlQhA4ekp_kb1j0tZu6dzYAANK9UUYD1KrcWyMC83FskUUJ5oV1ZzFODuajbnReZfrsq5dm-_YPaIgTwgzpd8cBBQiC1xnaUvdKw5jEwUASMYFwfcljvlkPC5rcQxVdivh4EOKFA8EaAW40W_2x7em78KcOwwk2d79i4tGPZc5Q7lEfwHM5ozRd6EQ8wLuD6SqIBLBn3oKRywI_4Lpf6YcWKukRD3y-Mo4f6jMKQM2WzUW37LVAmt2ze-sxa2XBNT4jL6bEeiJVr8dVLRv81KxlKs40tjxP-DmKvGtlAhs44rZtVya-faE5Y1qP56QC6lH3r1HgbWU52b4svdQHUJcA/3jq/CaMztz1JSdaD7IQN9FB19g/h2/Ga2OOdX59UEMblXP5z84BjpeaKc6bOQQMZqsMsMk0Bc) Thanks for your time Regina M., Campaign Manager

—---------FORWARDED MESSAGE—---------
From: JessicaCisnerosForCongress.com
Date: Sat, Feb. 19
Subject Line: Henry Cuellar just went up on TV to attack Jessica
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Peter, this is it. **We have just 9 days before Jessica’s primary election on March 1st!** Even though we are *so close* to the primary, we can’t slow down — not even for a minute. **Especially now that Henry Cuellar just went up on TV with ads attacking Jessica and our campaign!** **This election could come down to just a handful of votes. clean_body: If not, here’s the gist of it: | | | Hi Peter, Regina here — Jessica Cisneros’ campaign manager. I just wanted to make sure you saw our email from yesterday. If not, here’s the gist: With just 5 days left until the end of early voting, Henry Cuellar went on TV to attack Jessica and our movement to bring progressive change to South Texas. It’s no secret that Henry Cuellar will pull every stunt from his playbook in order to win — primarily because he’s losing some support due to his ongoing investigation with the FBI. Thanks for your time Regina M., Campaign Manager Jessica Cisneros for Congress —---------FORWARDED MESSAGE—--------- From: JessicaCisnerosForCongress.com Date: Sat, Feb. 19 Subject Line: Henry Cuellar just went up on TV to attack Jessica To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, this is it. We have just 9 days before Jessica’s primary election on March 1st! Even though we are so close to the primary, we can’t slow down — not even for a minute. Especially now that Henry Cuellar just went up on TV with ads attacking Jessica and our campaign! This election could come down to just a handful of votes. We can’t let Henry Cuellar win this election. He’s under FBI investigation and is supported by the Koch Brothers’. With just 10 days left, this is the best time for you to make a donation. Look, Henry Cuellar has a campaign war-chest of over $2 million dollars — but we have grassroots support from folks like you. With enough resources, we can get the job done. We came within an inch of defeating Henry Cuellar last election, but this time, we’re in a better spot to win. We don’t want to wake up on March 2nd and wonder if there’s anything more we could have done to help Jessica win. We have to leave it all on the table. Thank you so much for your support, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
---
| | |
Peter,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59614639:6M2rUXENM:m:1:3298722022:ECB77D232C1D8A82B6E4FF290B4480B2:r)_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power.**

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, [**_which is why we 're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59614639:6M2rUXENM:m:1:3298722022:ECB77D232C1D8A82B6E4FF290B4480B2:r)

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig! [**_$15 = 10 Miles_**

**_$30 = 20 Miles_**

**_$150 = 100 Miles_**

**_$375 = 250 Miles_**

**_$750 = 500 Miles_**

**_$1,500 = 1,000 Miles_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59614639:6M2rUXENM:m:1:3298722022:ECB77D232C1D8A82B6E4FF290B4480B2:r)
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

[**_So, I hope you 'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59614639:6M2rUXENM:m:1:3298722022:ECB77D232C1D8A82B6E4FF290B4480B2:r)

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

| Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

Friend,

It's been over a year since Joe Biden has taken office, and what a long year it has been.

Our nation has experienced the worst inflation in decades, a terrible supply shortage, a border crisis, a disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, AND COVID is raging out of control.

Despite his terrible record, much of the Liberal News media still refuses to hold Biden accountable which is why we're reaching out to REAL Americans like YOU, Friend, for help grading Joe Biden's first year in office.

name: Jessica, Heritage Action
subject: ALERT: the truth about CRT in schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Fellow Conservative, the radical Left doesn’t think our schools should be places of learning - they want full-blown Leftist in
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5rduhfno6lbofelbj7ubhgv1h5oldnurqj5gtg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgeeoj4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfddpic1jb4or7cirb2o9ge1i67c9he8q36shicoom8clhmtjm1ptk6prjbdbjmurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9ddm6urmephksipmadtgmlin49fg)
| |
---
**ALERT: Heritage Action is taking on the radical school boards and educators to end critical race theory and help our kids get the education they deserve!**
[**CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR SCHOOLS >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhlcisjld28k7vkfsji6dk20d1bifjblcmoaju2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgeeoj4cth2bs)
|
---
|
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0ak42rglt6kr7qjuqlfjhp9sca8edkjnv6j4i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgeeoj4cth2bs)
|
---
Fellow Conservative, the radical Left doesn’t think our schools should be places of learning - they want full-blown Leftist indoctrination centers.

That means biased educators, school boards who disregard the input of parents, and dangerous philosophies like Critical Race Theory.

After Heritage Action exposed CRT in Georgia's largest school district, the district denied critical race theory was being taught and removed the incriminating syllabus from their website. _The Left is determined to continue hiding the truth from parents. __[**FIGHT BACK >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6bcd720itu7os5ooefpr9jlhthko7sgr45c63ro_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgeeoj4cth2bs)_

Recently, Heritage Action uncovered a case out of Gwinnett County, Georgia, where the class syllabus plainly stated that students would be taught to use critical race theory as a lens to analyze other issues.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg72jdpgj00ap06hri34crhh2ctiosja7lgioauo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgeeoj4cth2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmc7s7tamo5r3bogi35me6b505ea0g9jcfl0cq98_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgeeoj4cth2bs)

**Here’s the exact quote, from the class syllabus:**

_Students will bridge the skills from AP Language to AP Research, analyzing the value of using different lenses in social criticism (Critical Race Theory, Feminist, Marxist, Psychoanalytic) to aid their analysis across issues, and the class will discuss how these perspectives apply to the different methods used by research fields._

**How do you DENY teaching critical race theory when your syllabus includes that very phrase?**

Just a few days after the syllabus was discovered by Heritage Action’s research team, Gwinnett County Public Schools erased the PDF from their website. But not before we downloaded and saved a copy.

They knew they slipped up, and we were here to expose them. _And we’re just getting started._

We’re on a mission to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS and we need YOUR help to do it.
[**CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR SCHOOLS >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmnc5d5juodc0e4if1hkkunjsg4sshbs8r40ijrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgeeoj4cth2bs)
Fellow Conservative, here’s what we’re doing.

We are standing up for our vulnerable children AGAINST CRITICAL RACE THEORY.
* We’re promoting an education environment that encourages free thought - not political compliance.
* We’re standing with parents who have been intimidated, silenced, or called terrorists for simply expressing concern.
* And we’re activating our grassroots army to support state legislation to protect students and remove critical race theory from classrooms. Because NO child should be taught that they are inherently bad or guilty because of the color of their skin.

As parents, family members, and concerned members of the community, we need to make sure our kids aren’t being force-fed this hateful doctrine.

To support parents, activists, and conservative lawmakers, we launched **SaveOurSchools.com –** a one-stop shop with information, resources, and legislation to get CRT out of our classrooms.

But to support all these efforts, we need conservatives like you on board to share the message. That’s why we’re asking you to join the fight and sign up to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS.

With your support, we’ll push for State Legislatures to make changes and kick CRT out of our schools! Because children should go to school and be free to think and free to learn!

**All you have to do is chip in here:_[https://heritageaction.com/action-save-our-schools/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc9vtbgc09hqleo52th8jhbgsc5lh5i08131b91o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgeeoj4cth2bs)_**

We’re already hard at work - as you read this, we’re out making progress!

In Georgia: we have backed bills like HB 888, HB 1084, and SB 377 which address this issue and make it illegal to force children to affirm and believe in the teachings of critical race theory.

In Arizona: Heritage Action representatives have briefed the state legislature encouraging the introduction of similar legislation.

And there’s more to come.

Our goals are clear — we believe all kids deserve a fair learning environment that teaches them to see one another as equals. _It’s not that difficult!_

If you can chip in now, you will be funding the grassroots armies working on the ground to ensure that America’s children have access to the education they deserve.

We hope to have you on our side.
[**CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR SCHOOLS >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4da6kd4f0abt8s0ra92606biccp8tqevfffuvv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cpgeeoj4cth2bs)
Thank you,

Jessica Anderson
Executive Director
Heritage Action for America
---
---

You can cancel or change this donation at any time by contacting us at 1-(202) 548-5280. This authorization shall remain in effect until you notify Heritage Action for America and Heritage Action has had reasonable time to act on it. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you in advance
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I wanted to send a quick note this Sunday morning to let you know just how important you are to this campaign.
#

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220220-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2151_6688874_9tCpMp&akid=2151%2E6688874%2E9tCpMp)

Friends —
I wanted to send a quick note this Sunday morning to let you know just how important you are to this campaign.
You see, most people who have been elected to public office will tell you their biggest supporters are the ones who write the largest checks.
Not us.
When we think about our biggest supporters, we think about the people who were there when we needed them the most.
The people who volunteered for Gabby during those early campaigns for State House and U.S. House of Representatives.
The people who prayed and sent letters after the shooting in Tucson.
And the nearly one million people who made a small-dollar donation to a Senate race that went down to the wire in 2020, and to this one in 2022.
But now we’re coming up to a critical end-of-month campaign fundraising deadline and are short of our fundraising goals. So, we’re asking, one more time:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to help us reach our fundraising goals for the month of February and defend this seat from the corporate special interest groups running millions in attack ads to defeat us?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220220-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2151_6688874_9tCpMp&akid=2151%2E6688874%2E9tCpMp)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220220-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2151_6688874_9tCpMp&akid=2151%2E6688874%2E9tCpMp)**
Thank you again for being such an important part of this campaign. Anything we accomplish together happens thanks to your support.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2151%2E6688874%2E9tCpMp).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Team Holly
subject: Wasting time on OUR dime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, l ast week I spent time volunteering at the Community Resource Center of Chattooga. Their food bank fills a need we have struggled with in GA-14 for many years, and being there to help showed me once again why I'm running for Congress.
While sorting and handing out food, I had the opportunity to talk with the founder who began the program 8 years ago. She felt compelled to start the food bank because she knew people in her life would go hungry without it. When she isn't at the food bank, she spends most of her time fostering teenagers and workshopping resumes with the young women leaving the foster system.
People like this are what hold our community together. Her struggles and triumphs remind me why this race is so important.
This work is especially touching for me, because my family has had to rely on food banks before. I know that our community's struggles go beyond party lines. We need to get back to the basics of helping one another and that starts with better representation. We need legislators who understand the problems and can fight for solutions.
It doesn't matter what side of the aisle you are on, we can find common ground in fighting for our community. That’s why our Rural Revival Plan is so special. I am fighting for resources that will help all of GA-14. The issues we face are not too hard to fix. We need a representative who is working for the people, not against them.
With your donation, we can make a difference today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0211b]
We can do this,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0211b] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]

Ringgold, GA 30736

| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwIPLjiSVrYB7aIHzKkAfU7rbE4YK6m4vsA5Gu8SkF9NF8FrV64tot15jlOY3Kwu9FnFEqMXMPzRth3Vt9_FTPgdti4adMA95OiH0CWW8qKdJ8XuRvS27rs8iFmSr6HkOa31u4LSgbPaW1wDmef7FGm8oYkz9a9o3io0OX2ZISyjMMud9fWxdZwDdP7XbrQca2BgUw9LmOB4ndvlkQDVEfmg/3jq/ZaMqrVJXQ5yYL9e4IH9pwQ/h0/sWcf5VEg6P9uVHjQ_s0VPAe6RvuUPGWCKHlA9_lSZRc)
Peter, Mark Kelly needs our help. Kyrsten Sinema's obstructionism is posing a _direct and immediate_ threat to the Democrats' congressional majority. Just two days ago, Sinema doubled down on her refusal to reform the filibuster to protect voting rights. By doing that — and by continuing to block President Biden's agenda and robbing Democrats of big successes they can run on — **Kyrsten Sinema is making it more likely that Democrats will lose this year's midterm election.** And one of the most endangered Democrats on the ballot this year is Sinema's Arizona colleague, Senator Mark Kelly. **Kyrsten Sinema may not care about Mark Kelly's re-election, but we do.[That's why we're asking you to split a gift between Mark Kelly's re-election campaign and Primary Sinema Project today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSxNNxRIe82Guhk4IOzx0iCm7LDUVBTZHzF1DEbDa1520t6-9F1xDjwulmVGjAyZUnRPApiSuW3zqvtOqnYiLdeBZ-9EbHIY_W1XC5Ii29Xd9ukkHqLL2bYAXbO9gxrQawvjMelSoQhFuM8WYkwTUf7GvfZdZQoa4_VJ-UC-PwDZLu4--PRBIT__oKxG0uywEmYOIQJmROu1qmX5oLeGHk6N3Fd8C1ApzANOHPWs9yCYul-1xAV8_fv6j06J6vz3A9M7gygZn1DJc3DKO3sGG5shBqHJv1pZ4ZNK-81WXZFsM/3jq/ZaMqrVJXQ5yYL9e4IH9pwQ/h1/nS2TlUm5eLoXSNm_4Y8dSumQc9Y56ui4LgPlrZXM7YY)** **[Split a donation »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSxNNxRIe82Guhk4IOzx0iCm7LDUVBTZHzF1DEbDa1520-jTWsWJOkDRwiDoqdc6WhoQ1y_oDNUcejLNP51fVdPpdmx98rpwtYC26pvspEpI7DwyMVFAHxWEKjGU-_w7ivrh1NTTryIucuevqdE9XiSTfo4gJPJdaUfMdD5gGi4DdpCiMZ8MRTMYbwrHIZjDLJfTqSPUjEzwyVsqcK99nBHufNQdj9z_ouxeXo7b1uWT287MQNa85TGZdiG6jfQeOXwwPAkAiKRyoO19PlYZcvlHxRjNoPVy8-5KRa-CNAJA8/3jq/ZaMqrVJXQ5yYL9e4IH9pwQ/h2/e_FWDekJAGpnR8xth1Zuo5KBMHzLYNIMB4cQ_3LbvFA)** With the Senate split 50-50, we need to re-elect every single Democratic senator on the ballot this year if we're going to make any progress on key issues like climate change, voting rights, or abortion. Plus, if we can flip a few seats in addition to re-electing every Democratic senator, we could actually render Kyrsten Sinema's obstructionism _completely irrelevant._ **So we need all hands on deck.** Sinema is making it harder by the day for Democrats to win. But if we come out strong for Mark Kelly, we'll help him build his campaign, spread the word, and show the people of Arizona why _he_ actually deserves to be re-elected. **[Your gift will be automatically split between Mark Kelly's re-election campaign and Primary Sinema Project, so please contribute what you can today. Mark Kelly and the entire Democratic senate majority might depend on it!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSxNNxRIe82Guhk4IOzx0iCm7LDUVBTZHzF1DEbDa1523YJkVIO5GnnQPp1whXtO6_saWPOCNj9GieyqyivtL-BbWc6K4_rk_BxyzRnmGCVwo8Eij3NZCNkLIzEfImljWIAXxkq3rszpZjJSyAK-4n8eLKSDiV9NgfO6QYT5DigpyC7RkQlXCcaIS5aWlmTVhtLqRjcMWpi2Qz_yRTbX4Qh0lvmq1a_rZeDZXza7kgsly457EAeC43eLthHpxjepse6Yn2wYY3U_hfs9j3tZINVaTvQSaEDh3mtVNzWuLMONY/3jq/ZaMqrVJXQ5yYL9e4IH9pwQ/h3/8ZMpv8667qLzIvQJul5iJ7g8hOOkmWA-wGtsNmrIE4o)** Nearly every issue we care about is on the line. They all hinge on Democrats keeping our majority. Thankfully, we can do our part to make that happen by supporting Mark Kelly today. Thank you so much, Primary Sinema Project

clean_body: | | | Peter, Mark Kelly needs our help. Kyrsten Sinema's obstructionism is posing a direct and immediate threat to the Democrats' congressional majority. Just two days ago, Sinema doubled down on her refusal to reform the filibuster to protect voting rights. By doing that — and by continuing to block President Biden's agenda and robbing Democrats of big successes they can run on — Kyrsten Sinema is making it more likely that Democrats will lose this year's midterm election. And one of the most endangered Democrats on the ballot this year is Sinema's Arizona colleague, Senator Mark Kelly. Kyrsten Sinema may not care about Mark Kelly's re-election, but we do. With the Senate split 50-50, we need to re-elect every single Democratic senator on the ballot this year if we're going to make any progress on key issues like climate change, voting rights, or abortion. Plus, if we can flip a few seats in addition to re-electing every Democratic senator, we could actually render Kyrsten Sinema's obstructionism completely irrelevant. So we need all hands on deck. Sinema is making it harder by the day for Democrats to win. But if we come out strong for Mark Kelly, we'll help him build his campaign, spread the word, and show the people of Arizona why he actually deserves to be re-elected. Nearly every issue we care about is on the line. They all hinge on Democrats keeping our majority. Thankfully, we can do our part to make that happen by supporting Mark Kelly today. Thank you so much, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . We need folks to tell us which bumper sticker to send to the printers so our swag can hit the streets (or bikes, or water bottles, or wherever) ASAP. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: 15 minutes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time, but let me promise you that with a schedule like mine, it’s an absolute gift.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42021346/331330642/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=72f0db1b-6792-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=oRX1LJhcOkUzcT2fjLkZE+U40jGJ2SSnCK1x0wUuy2f/q9fm7pN6YDes+fW2myCO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmYwZGIxYi02NzkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yft0BQqZD3Z58X1LzWUS-FzS9i1uZ729oaFhB0sRXiQ=)
Friends -
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time, but let me promise you that with a schedule like mine, it’s an absolute gift.
I know you probably get a good amount of emails, so I wanted to take this time to tell you about my decision to run for office in the first place, and why your support is so important.
The truth is, when my wife Katherine and I first decided I’d run for the Maryland state legislature, we didn't really think about how this would change our lives. We both believed strongly in the power of government to help people and that seemed like enough. We actually made our campaign mailers at our kitchen table and the food for our fundraisers so we could pay the printers! And thanks to the support and love from a lot of people, I won my first election as part of the “Choice Team” that unseated an incumbent opposed to reproductive rights.
I was later elected to the House by a wave of grassroots support led by folks I had worked with to champion education, environment, gun safety and social justice issues. In Congress I authored the original DISCLOSE Act to end secret money in our elections and helped lead the fight for access to affordable health care, wall street reform, and prioritizing the needs of American families and to push back against the Tea Party’s attacks on Medicare, Social Security and programs for the most needy.
But after a number of terms, I decided to run for the Senate to represent all Marylanders. Again, we weren’t sure what to expect. But as has been a constant refrain every step of the way,, anything I’ve been able to accomplish has been because of the support of a lot of people stepping up to help. No one accomplishes something like this all by themselves. It takes a large group of folks who believe in the potential of our democracy, in progress and working for positive change.
But now we have our next challenge — my first Senate re-election. And if we’re going to win again, it’s going to take a similar level of support from supporters like you.
So please:
**[Can you make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Maryland? The amount of the donation isn’t nearly as important as the number of donations we receive. It all adds up when everyone is chipping in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42021348/331330644/396464211?refcode=em220220-30&refcode2=72f0db1b-6792-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=oRX1LJhcOkUzcT2fjLkZE+U40jGJ2SSnCK1x0wUuy2f/q9fm7pN6YDes+fW2myCO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmYwZGIxYi02NzkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yft0BQqZD3Z58X1LzWUS-FzS9i1uZ729oaFhB0sRXiQ=)**
Nothing less than control of the Senate, and any chance at progress is at stake in this race.
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42021350/331330646/396464211?refcode=em220220-30&refcode2=72f0db1b-6792-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=oRX1LJhcOkUzcT2fjLkZE+U40jGJ2SSnCK1x0wUuy2f/q9fm7pN6YDes+fW2myCO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmYwZGIxYi02NzkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yft0BQqZD3Z58X1LzWUS-FzS9i1uZ729oaFhB0sRXiQ=)**

Thank you so much. For everything.
Onwards,
Chris

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2f6c3d5d-d291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/72f0db1b-6792-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmYwZGIxYi02NzkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yft0BQqZD3Z58X1LzWUS-FzS9i1uZ729oaFhB0sRXiQ=&id=102988412), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

body:
I will keep holding the line for New Mexico against extremists as your Secretary of State.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42038975/331369588/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220220CowboysforTrump_OPPO_DM_90DO_6_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDQxMjc4YS05MjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0T_xDaCWgc6P2RzxSsx9ciG9-5VwXr6YidROM9qfiVY=)
**The extremist group Cowboys for Trump campaigned across our state, collecting donations and promoting Trump’s far-right agenda.** While doing so, they tried to operate off the grid by filing a lawsuit to avoid publicly disclosing their donors.

Two years ago, I ordered Cowboys for Trump to register as a political action committee or face a fine. They refused and decided to countersue instead.

**But now, a federal judge on the 10th Circuit Court of Appeals has dismissed their case. Their efforts to unlawfully interfere with our elections here in New Mexico have ended in _failure_.**

Since day one of Cowboys for Trump's unwelcome presence here, I've stood up to these bullies every step of the way. As Secretary of State, I’ve always fought for strong election transparency, and I refuse to allow this hateful extremist group to get away with their flagrant disregard for our campaign finance laws and make a mockery of our elections. And I’ll stand up against any group that does this – regardless of political affiliation.

Now _Cowboys for Trump_ will be held accountable — **and you can count on me to do everything in my power to continue holding them accountable and prevent them from operating illegally in our state.

[But in order for me to keep holding the line against extremists and protecting the integrity of New Mexico politics, I need to keep my seat safe. Can I count on you to pitch in to help me continue this important work as your New Mexico Secretary of State? Thank you for being in this fight with me,

Maggie

Hey Peter, Did you know that while serving as a representative in the Colorado statehouse, Dr. Caraveo was the prime sponsor of legislation to drive down the absurdly high costs of prescription drugs? That bill, the _Prescription Drug Affordability Review Board_ (CO SB21-175), was signed into law last July, and will ensure that families are able to afford the lifesaving medication they and their children need. **Dr. Caraveo’s track record of standing up to immensely powerful pharmaceutical companies is so important — because Big Pharma is unfortunately bigger than ever.** [_**Will you make a $25 donation today to help us send Dr. Caraveo to Congress to fight against the corruption of Big Pharma on behalf of families everywhere?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42022427/331334574/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220220pharma_ES_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzcxMWJhMi02OTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daWglnobGQamt7EZoUr8XxI4zz1lxDbOzOVb-Z6BO5o=) | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42022431/331334575/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220220pharma_ES_allop_xx_btn&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzcxMWJhMi02OTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daWglnobGQamt7EZoUr8XxI4zz1lxDbOzOVb-Z6BO5o=)

With President Biden and Democrats in Congress pushing for legislation that would rein in the unchecked greed of Big Pharma — which views prescription medications as dollar signs on a spreadsheet instead of critical, life-saving healthcare for working Coloradans — they’re spending big money to try and stop them. Despite two years of lies, COVID fear-mongering, and relentless attacks from the dishonest corporate media, America's greatest Governor was never going to let unscientific Faucian mandates dictate how Floridians live. Millions of Americans are fleeing to Florida from blue states because they are sick and tired of draconian lockdowns, and they want their freedom back. And the best part is that among the millions of tourists who have traveled to Florida are a handful of hypocritical lockdown liberals from across the country. Yes, we're talking about failed CNN anchor Chris Cuomo who was just spotted in Palm Beach. But that's okay, Chris...we like freedom, too! And as long as Ron DeSantis is your governor, Florida will always be a free state, and it will continue to prosper Team DeSantis

name: Sen. Cortez Masto
subject: BREAKING: most vulnerable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Friend, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped
dramatically.

National Journal just named me the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot,
which means Mitch McConnell will be zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat
he needs to flip the Senate. If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate.

I'm no stranger to a tough race — but this is going to be the closest
Senate race of the year. The entire force of the GOP is coming after me,
so I can’t do this alone. I’ve got to be honest, friend: I’m
facing a major fundraising gap and I need your immediate help.

The GOP is already blanketing Nevada with more than $4 million in attack
ads to defeat me. We just ran the numbers and I need to raise at least
$25,000 by midnight to have the resources to fight back – but right now
I'm falling short.

Please, friend, can you help me turn this around before it's too
late? Here's the best link to make your donation:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7664?t=1007&amount=25&akid=2422%2E3611125%2EqG05lJ ]secure.actblue.com/donate/rya_ccm_split

Any amount makes a difference in our fight to defend the Senate. Thanks
for giving what you can.

¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!

Catherine

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7664?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2422%2E3611125%2EqG05lJ ]Catherine Cortez Masto
