name: Charles Booker
subject: The cost of inaction is too high.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter...we have to
get this guy out of office.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16653?refcode=em20220220-1584&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1584%2E346206%2EguWf_O ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16653?refcode=em20220220-1584&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1584%2E346206%2EguWf_O ][IMG]

Rand Paul led a dangerous push to spread COVID misinformation to make a
profit off Big Pharma. He’s voted down countless bills that would support
workers and families who have been hurt the most in this pandemic.

And now instead of focusing on ways to help Kentucky — one of the hardest
hit states by recent COVID surges — he keeps playing political games.

Enough is enough. I’m running to replace Rand Paul because the cost of
inaction is too high.

But I can’t do this work alone,
Peter. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16653?refcode=em20220220-1584&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1584%2E346206%2EguWf_O ]Will you chip in
$5 or anything you can to fund our voter outreach efforts
so we can make history in Kentucky this year? It’s critical we secure the
funds we need to build our organizing programs and retire Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16653?refcode=em20220220-1584&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1584%2E346206%2EguWf_O ]Contribute $5

For years now, Rand Paul has been picking a fight with Dr. Fauci to
distract us from his own failed leadership and selfish priorities in the
Senate. He focuses his time on levying irrelevant, personal attacks on Dr.
Fauci.

But last time this happened — Dr. Fauci fired back with screenshots of
Rand’s website which shows how the Senator is trying to fundraise off of
getting Dr. Fauci fired.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16653?refcode=em20220220-1584&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1584%2E346206%2EguWf_O ][IMG]

Kentucky is hungry for bold change and I’m ready to lead this work so we
can bring real, working class leadership to the Senate.

We’re working to build a campaign that represents ALL of us, from the hood
to the holler. But doing this kind of in-depth voter outreach takes a lot
of resources and funding.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16653?refcode=em20220220-1584&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=1584%2E346206%2EguWf_O ]That’s why it’s important we send a loud message today about the
strength of our movement and power our organizing efforts. Will you chip
in $5 or anything you can to help out?

Let’s win this,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220220-1584-footer&t=1026&refcode2=1584_346206_guWf_O&akid=1584%2E346206%2EguWf_O

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Scores of volunteers all over Northern Michigan and the U.P. are energized and mobilized, canvassing the district and spreading our message to voters. I'm no rookie to politics, but as a first run for Congress, that kind of support is humbling. I admired their efforts on Friday at the UP200 as they walked up and down Washington Street in Marquette to collect nomination petition signatures. Their cheeks were red and their Dr. Bob shirts were layered on top of all their winter gear. But the cold didn’t stop them from showing up. People are willing to stand out in the February cold at a park in Traverse City to talk to constituents about my candidacy. I am grateful and overwhelmed with their enthusiasm and passion. Politics is sometimes inherently negative, especially on social media. America is divided, and this district is frustrated and fed-up with divisive leadership. The vitriol, misinformation, and angry name-calling can be demoralizing. But, there's always people like this, people who have hope that politics can be different — that there can be change. That real, honest people can serve in Congress, too. We can elect people of the community to represent us — accessible people genuinely looking out for the best interests of those they serve. Thank you to all our current and future volunteers. Your hard work means so much to me and to all of us in this district that are yearning for a new type representation.

| | Dr. Bob Lorinser is a democratic candidate for Michigan's 1st District Congressional seat, a district spanning across the Northern lower peninsula and the Upper Peninsula. He would be honored to represent all the residents of the District, including the young and old, people of all genders, those that agree and disagree with him, moderates, and progressives. He is an experienced diplomat, statesman, and physician from Northern Michigan running for Michigan's First Congressional District. With your support, Dr. Bob hopes to serve and represent the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan. Why is he running for Congress? In one word: Service. He has a strong sense of duty and hope to offer Northern Michigan true, honest and ethical representation.

Together, with your support, he can fulfill the needs of our communities' everyday citizens and working families. He's confident he can be an effective member of Congress for the 1st District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American.

He will run on a bedrock of principles — wisdom, justice, courage, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law.

You deserve a change. You deserve a Representative with a moral compass, integrity, someone who speaks the truth, and tries to embody all that is best in this great district. You deserve a Congressman with vision, who has the ability to recognize problems on the horizon and develop reasonable solutions, someone who has the ability to build a consensus to achieve that vision.

The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. It's time to unite. It's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities.

He strives to be Northern Michigan's voice of reason in Washington, D.C..

He's eager to continue his service. He's incredibly humbled to run and it would be his life's honor to represent you. Please share his message with your friends and family. Victory will not happen without your support and generosity. Vision: Dr. Bob is interested in independent, reasonable solutions that best fit the First District, regardless of which side of the aisle those solutions originate. He is hyperfocused on the reunification of our communities and country.
Regardless of which party voters affiliate, he strives to be the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan's 'voice of reason' in Washington, dedicated to advancing policies that reflect our common goals. Lorinser is confident his developing initiatives will be much more representative of the district's values and priorities than the current incumbent. Dr. Bob stands on certain principles that will guide his policy decisions and seeks to be a true representative of the people of the 1st District. # AMMON BUNDY ANSWERS YOUR QUESTIONS MONDAY

KEVIN MILLER - KIDO: Ammon Bundy will answer your questions concerning his race to become Idaho's next governor.Mr. Bundy's appearance is courtesy of his winning our gubernatorial poll that registered over 150,000 votes. His campaign defeated every other Republican candidate on the ballot. Tune in at 9:05 on 580 AM or 107.5 FM**Read Kevin Miller's Article:**<https://kidotalkradio.com/ammon-bundy-answers-your-questions-monday/>

* * *

**Alaska Outdoor Council endorses Kelly Tshibaka for Senate**

Peter,
This is a HUGE deal!
Kelly is honored to receive this endorsement. The Alaska Outdoor Council has a membership of over 10,000 Alaskans statewide and advocates for Alaskan control of Alaska’s land and resources.
---
---
As Senator, Kelly will always be a champion for Alaska’s rights and the rights of people who want to take advantage of outdoor pursuits. In contrast, Murkowski rolls over for the Biden administration and the radical environmentalists, hurting Alaskans.

And while this endorsement is great, Kelly knows it's YOUR endorsement that matters. This America First campaign is run by grassroots patriots like YOU!

clean_body: | | | | Find out more —> | Alaska Outdoor Council endorses Kelly Tshibaka for Senate Peter, This is a HUGE deal! Kelly is honored to receive this endorsement. The Alaska Outdoor Council has a membership of over 10,000 Alaskans statewide and advocates for Alaskan control of Alaska’s land and resources. As Senator, Kelly will always be a champion for Alaska’s rights and the rights of people who want to take advantage of outdoor pursuits. In contrast, Murkowski rolls over for the Biden administration and the radical environmentalists, hurting Alaskans. And while this endorsement is great, Kelly knows it's YOUR endorsement that matters. This America First campaign is run by grassroots patriots like YOU! We always appreciate your support! Team Tshibaka | | | | ==

name: Team Benson
subject: Jocelyn is the voice of the pro-democracy movement
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Jocelyn is the ’s a leading voice
of the pro-democracy movement

“The question is not whether we think
democracy is under assault. It is.
The question is what are we, the American people
and every elected leader in this country
who values truth and the Constitution,
going to do about it.”

“Democracy will prevail in 2022 and beyond,
as it did in 2020,
if we place as our highest priority
the work of building a nonpartisan,
pro-democracy coalition
committed to seeking truth,
following the rule of law
and upholding the will of the people.”

“Each of us have a choice
as a real, coordinated, political strategy
to dismantle American democracy unfolds before us:
will we walk away discouraged and give up
or will we dig in, work together, and do all we can to save it?

name: Morgan Harper
subject: I’ll make this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
What our campaign needs right now
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220220-681-footer-ak&t=2&akid=681%2E90090%2E9T-M71)
Hey,
I just stepped out of debate prep, so I’ll make this quick.
We’re getting ready to go head-to-head with right-wing extremist Josh Mandel in another debate TOMORROW, and what would really show the strength of our campaign is a surge of contributions right now.
**[Can you chip in $5, $15, $50, or whatever makes sense for you right now to show our far-right opponent that we mean business?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26050?t=3&akid=681%2E90090%2E9T-M71)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26056?refcode=em20220220-681&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=681%2E90090%2E9T-M71)**
I promised to debate anyone, any time, any place to show the voters of Ohio my vision for the future and to stand up for the people. While I’ve been taking on Republicans directly, Tim Ryan refuses to debate me – and the party establishment in Ohio endorsed him without a second thought. It’s a disservice to the people of Ohio, and goes against our values as Democrats. I need your help to propel our movement forward so we can take on Republicans and the establishment.
**[I’ve got to get back to debate prep, but if you can chip in whatever makes sense for you today it’d mean a lot.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26050?t=23&akid=681%2E90090%2E9T-M71)**
Thank you!
Morgan

Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate
P.S. [**You can tune into the debate live at 7:30pm ET at this link!**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26219?t=25&akid=681%2E90090%2E9T-M71)

body:

That means control of the Senate could be _anyone’s game_.

name: Message from James Carville
subject: Here's what I'm dropping in to tell you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But she can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12% (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign, especially since she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42039577/331373094/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2460-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQxNzAyMy05OTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1AsrUj7b6d_FrFZmllxgzrJaaErJs2OeHpyHxLATg8=)**
From the campaign trail to the White House, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before the midnight deadline tonight – to elect Val Demings and expand Democrats' Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42039578/331373095/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2460-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQxNzAyMy05OTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1AsrUj7b6d_FrFZmllxgzrJaaErJs2OeHpyHxLATg8=)**

body:
In the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42039638/331373377/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjA0M2RmYi05OTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cBlsM51HPiXb20-hdcnNKwAAoIAarwU68xpAhJzsJkU=)

Peter,

I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my coming out experience.

**In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet!**

For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed.

**I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012.**

Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans.

But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. [**Peter, in 1994 when I was attacked for my identity, I lost my race because I didn’t have good people like you by my side. But now I do -- and I’m hoping that I can count on you to chip in $3 to help me fight back against hateful Republicans and stop their anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. Will you help me reach my $10,000 End of Month goal? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42039639/331373378/301334478?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220220_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjA0M2RmYi05OTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cBlsM51HPiXb20-hdcnNKwAAoIAarwU68xpAhJzsJkU=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42039645/331373384/301334478?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20220220_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjA0M2RmYi05OTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cBlsM51HPiXb20-hdcnNKwAAoIAarwU68xpAhJzsJkU=)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need your help, Derek
body:
Derek,

I'd prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours.

However, my finance team is telling me we're in a bit of a sticky spot. We have a significant gap in our fundraising, and we need to raise $12,388 by midnight tonight. That's bad under normal circumstances, but with the GOP spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat in the country, it is the absolute worst time for our numbers to lag.

As I said, asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but M itch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7 million to unseat me . And if I miss this goal, it will invite even more dark money in New Hampshire. In a purple state like New Hampshire, that could be the difference between winning or losing.

That's why I need your help to get us out of this rut, Derek. Will you please split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood? What you give right now will help close our fundraising gap and protect this seat – and the Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220219_CGVA_Hassan]

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220219_CGVA_Hassan&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220219_CGVA_Hassan&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220219_CGVA_Hassan&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220219_CGVA_Hassan&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220219_CGVA_Hassan&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220219_CGVA_Hassan]

My Senate race was the closest one on the map in 2016. The only way we'll win in November is if we have the resources we need to reach every voter and push back against the GOP's misleading attack ads.
I know it's easy to think that a grassroots donation won't make a dent. But I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign, and your contribution makes a huge difference.

Derek, please split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood right now to help my campaign turn our fundraising around. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220219_CGVA_Hassan]

Thank you – I'm so grateful.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fcfb3836-f890-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/bd8e899e-9a92-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDhlODk5ZS05YTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPznwd6a3_i6bfOFqE3kvMzSpx93jeuBevrehSbAvCg=&id=108609855 .

name: Team DPVA
subject: Can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
the path to a Democratic Majority runs through VA

|
---
Derek, Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats only hold a _slim_ _ majority_ right now. The GOP only needs to flip 6 seats to take control of the House of Representatives and give the gavel to Jim Jordan or Kevin McCarthy. **Republicans are looking to take advantage of Presidential backlash and take back control - and they’re looking to Virginia as both a proving ground and their best path to the majority.[Will you chip in to help us protect our Democratic seats this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42039783/331373993/1455862206?refcode=dpva-em-220220-path&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWY5NDY4NC05YjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ilvRUw7V5__WyCeY8cz3C5-qORXvJpSdHlMYFXB5C0U=)** We need to prove that Glenn Youngkin’s election was an exception, not the new rule. clean_body: Democrats will only stop McConnell and his allies from taking back the Senate if we go on the offensive ... | | | Peter – right now, the Senate is split 50-50, meaning Mitch McConnell and his allies only have to flip ONE seat to take back control. I can stop them right here in Iowa, but the GOP is sitting on $39 MILLION to defeat challengers like me and flip the Senate red. After polling revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley (R-IA) to an eighth term, he's now facing record-low approval ratings! Sen. Grassley has never been this vulnerable. = Don't just take it from me: Even Iowa's TOP pollster is pointing to "weakness" in his polling numbers. There's real momentum here on the ground and we've got to take advantage of it. Democrats will only stop McConnell and his allies from taking back the Senate if we go on the offensive – and that starts in Iowa. But I'm up against the entire force of the GOP establishment so I'm counting on your grassroots support. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = This race is really critical, so thank you for having my back here. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Wes Moore
subject: Black history is American history.
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42039919/331374587/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_na_20220220BHM_wm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGEyMTFiNy05ZDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fl9TYjfP6j4wvz9rWjCTocnYdYngtne_JMFoGE97xF0=)
---
Friends, February marks Black History Month, a time for us to acknowledge the struggles faced by Black Americans both past and present, and celebrate the rich culture and countless achievements made by our communities throughout history. Black history is not just a celebration of those who came before us, but of the lessons that they taught us. Lessons like there is never a room we don’t belong in. Lessons like there is never a conversation we can’t contribute to. Lessons like there isn’t a seat of leadership that we can’t obtain. We owe an immeasurable debt to those who came before us. Legends born here in Maryland like Frederick Douglass, Harriet Tubman, Thurgood Marshall, and Gloria Richardson. Frederick Douglass fought for a more just world that he would never live in. Harriet Tubman walked through darkness so that we could see light. Thurgood Marshall changed laws so that we could see justice. Gloria Richardson fought segregation, so that we could all build together. Today, our history is reflected in the Black history around us. Marylanders like my grandfather, who left service in the U.S, Army and became a postal worker, raising his family in Prince George’s County. Marylanders like my dad, who was a broadcast journalist who died far too young. Or like my mom, the strongest person I've ever met, who raised three kids as a young widow working multiple jobs to provide for my sisters and me. **Black history is American history. Our recognition of the stories, perspectives, and persisting struggles of the African American experience in America must never be relegated to February alone.** We celebrate everyone making Black history today and everyday. Justice and progress are hard-fought, but they are impossible without you. Elevate, Wes PS — Our historic campaign would make me the first Black Governor of Maryland and ensure every Marylander has the resources and opportunities to thrive, no matter their background. **[Help us make history and progress this year by supporting our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42039920/331374588/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_na_20220220BHM_wm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGEyMTFiNy05ZDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fl9TYjfP6j4wvz9rWjCTocnYdYngtne_JMFoGE97xF0=)** | | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.
---

body:
LBR and Democrats in Congress have passed seminal legislation, but it’s stuck in the Senate. Do you want to see those bills passed?
Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42040116/331375368/1627587959?refcode=EM_PET_220220bbb_n_tm_actives_4_ng_na_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDZmOTMyMC1hMDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uRCfQMPUwmk0V90ECdRdz0wZk4iy07JjW_2cMJRO5J4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42040117/331375369/1627587959?refcode=EM_PET_220220bbb_n_tm_actives_4_ng_na_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDZmOTMyMC1hMDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uRCfQMPUwmk0V90ECdRdz0wZk4iy07JjW_2cMJRO5J4=) Friend,

LBR and her Democratic colleagues in the House have passed dozens of pieces of legislation that will address the most pressing issues our country faces today.

From voting rights to the Women’s Health Protection Act to Build Back Better to updating America’s infrastructure and fixing our supply chain, there’s so much good that could be done if the Senate passes just some of the legislation that has gotten through the House.

_**But with the Senate in an even tie, Mitch McConnell and the far-right members of the Senate are hoping to run out the clock on this Congress and pass as few bills as possible.**_

**[If you think the Senate should pass Build Back Better and the rest of the bills that have gotten through the House, click here to add your name to our list of supporters!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42040118/331375370/-1139308640?refcode=EM_PET_220220bbb_n_tm_actives_4_ng_na_na_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDZmOTMyMC1hMDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uRCfQMPUwmk0V90ECdRdz0wZk4iy07JjW_2cMJRO5J4=)** | | **[Pass Build Back Better!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42040119/331375371/-1139308640?refcode=EM_PET_220220bbb_n_tm_actives_4_ng_na_na_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDZmOTMyMC1hMDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uRCfQMPUwmk0V90ECdRdz0wZk4iy07JjW_2cMJRO5J4=)**
---
Thanks for your time!

Team LBR

subject: Asking you to chip in $5
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42040234/331376100/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGIyMmVkNC1hMDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5YNFhoFGspx7reraAKDIX0medUmDjp3Qotcadsxumds=)

| | Peter – **[We’re about to ask you to chip in $5 to Laura’s campaign,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42040235/331376102/902423312?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220220_FR_EOM1Ask5_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGIyMmVkNC1hMDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5YNFhoFGspx7reraAKDIX0medUmDjp3Qotcadsxumds=)** but first let us explain why our end-of-month fundraising deadline is so important:
1. **What we raise this month will set the tone for 2022.** Early investment into Laura’s campaign is critical for assessing its strength. We need Laura’s fundraising numbers to reflect that our grassroots team is a force to be reckoned with.
2. **What we raise this month will dictate our campaign strategy.** We set our fundraising goals based on how many voters we need to reach out to, how much we need to invest in our digital campaign, and the amount that we need to invest in our staff and volunteers. body:

Peter,

When I was in the White House, America had a President who put our Nation FIRST every single day. For the first time in a long time, power was taken from Washington and given BACK to the American People.

Unfortunately, Joe Biden and the rest of the Washington SWAMP are working overtime to undo everything my administration accomplished. _Mark my words, America will be put FIRST again, but only with the help of my most loyal supporters._

You've always been a trusted ally, Peter, which is why I want to offer you something very exclusive.

| Republicans move pretty quickly, especially when they think they can take back the House majority. **I announced my re-election campaign just weeks ago, and I already have multiple Republican opponents vying for this seat.**

Republicans are eager to get me out of Congress because they know I am a strong progressive advocate on issues like making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, passing the Green New Deal, and lowering prescription drug prices. They want to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for their extremist agenda — but I won’t let them. [_**Can you rush $5 today to ensure we have a strong campaign ready to take on whatever Republican attacks come our way?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42036225/331353599/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220220-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjhkYjRlYi03YzkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hv9SKZ4Dcx28MQELgNESTOpMVoNlabsiJU9W3HPT1Fs=)

clean_body: I already have multiple Republican opponents vying for this seat. | = | Republicans move pretty quickly, especially when they think they can take back the House majority. I announced my re-election campaign just weeks ago, and I already have multiple Republican opponents vying for this seat. Republicans are eager to get me out of Congress because they know I am a strong progressive advocate on issues like making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, passing the Green New Deal, and lowering prescription drug prices. They want to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for their extremist agenda — but I won’t let them. = | = I want to send a strong message to Republicans that I am here to advocate for my constituents, and I’m not going anywhere. Every grassroots contribution shows that supporters in San Diego and across the country have my back. = | | | = | = | = | = | = I greatly appreciate your support as I defend this seat and stay in Congress working for American families and workers. name: Wade Herring HQ
subject: Wade’s Weekly Whereabouts!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=022022whemh [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=022022whemh]
Good evening Peter!
Before we share what Wade was up to this week – can you take a moment and pitch in to our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=022022whem] We are halfway through this quarter and we need your help to keep the momentum going!
Click to pitch in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=022022whem]
We kicked off this week by attending the new Ridgewood Park ribbon-cutting ceremony with the Habersham Village Neighborhood Alliance. It was amazing to witness firsthand all of the active community involvement by this organization – we encourage others to get involved at the local level too! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/whereswade022022edit_2.jpg]
On Friday, Wade ventured over to McIntosh County for the Leadership Southeast Georgia kickoff reception for the Class of 2022! This event was truly amazing, but the gorgeous sunset on the coast was even better! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/whereswade022022edit_1.jpg]
On Sunday, Wade attended a beautiful service at Jonesville Baptist Church in Savannah. We look forward to returning in the future! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/whereswade022022edit_3.jpg]
We had a wonderful afternoon at the Local Union 188 Shrimp Boil. The weather was beautiful, the shrimp was delicious, and the people were wonderful to spend the day with. We ended the day out on Tybee for an oyster roast and a bit of live music. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/whereswade022022edit.jpg]
Finally, Wade attended the Pembroke City Council meeting and spoke with the city council as well as citizens of Bryan County. Thank you for the warm welcome! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/whereswade022022edit_4.jpg]
Our campaign is picking up speed as we get closer to the election! Keep tuning in to see where Wade is spreading the word about his candidacy.
Thank you for your continued support,
Wade Herring HQ
Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=020622whemb]
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com

clean_body: [] Good evening Peter! Before we share what Wade was up to this week – can you take a moment and pitch in to our campaign? [] We are halfway through this quarter and we need your help to keep the momentum going! Click to pitch in today! [] We kicked off this week by attending the new Ridgewood Park ribbon-cutting ceremony with the Habersham Village Neighborhood Alliance. It was amazing to witness firsthand all of the active community involvement by this organization – we encourage others to get involved at the local level too! [] On Friday, Wade ventured over to McIntosh County for the Leadership Southeast Georgia kickoff reception for the Class of 2022! This event was truly amazing, but the gorgeous sunset on the coast was even better! [] On Sunday, Wade attended a beautiful service at Jonesville Baptist Church in Savannah. We look forward to returning in the future! [] We had a wonderful afternoon at the Local Union 188 Shrimp Boil. The weather was beautiful, the shrimp was delicious, and the people were wonderful to spend the day with. We ended the day out on Tybee for an oyster roast and a bit of live music. [] Finally, Wade attended the Pembroke City Council meeting and spoke with the city council as well as citizens of Bryan County. Thank you for the warm welcome! [] Our campaign is picking up speed as we get closer to the election! Keep tuning in to see where Wade is spreading the word about his candidacy. Thank you for your continued support, Wade Herring HQ Support Wade [] [] [] [] www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress Wade Herring for Congress PO Box 9145 Savannah, GA 31412 United States

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Going big on broadband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Everyone in PA should have broadband access. No exceptions.
When John was in Smethport, PA last weekend, a member of the crowd shared that people park outside of the local library just to use the internet, because they can’t get it anywhere else.
**That’s unacceptable, Derek.**
In Pennsylvania, and across the country, from cities to rural areas, everyone should have access to stable high-speed Internet from home.
If you agree that everyone should be able to use the many services afforded by Internet access, like seeing doctors via telehealth, applying to jobs, and accessing online school, [**_will you add your name to John’s new petition to tell Congress to fund universal broadband access once and for all?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-broadband/?source=em20220220-4666&t=1&akid=4666%2E434096%2EN9Qpw6)
**[Sign Now →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-broadband/?source=em20220220-4666&t=2&akid=4666%2E434096%2EN9Qpw6)**
When millions of students and workers went virtual during the Covid-19 pandemic, it showed beyond a doubt that Internet access is not a “nice-to-have”. It’s a need-to-have. __
If John were in the Senate representing Pennsylvania right now, you can bet that he'd be pushing his colleagues in Congress to fund and deploy universal broadband access. But working families can't afford to wait any longer.
**So we’re asking you to take action today:[_Tell Congress to fund universal broadband access. It's time to make sure everyone has the ability to get online._](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-broadband/?source=em20220220-4666&t=3&akid=4666%2E434096%2EN9Qpw6)**
**[Sign Now →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-broadband/?source=em20220220-4666&t=4&akid=4666%2E434096%2EN9Qpw6)**
Thank you for signing on, ✊
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220220-4666-footer&t=5&refcode2=4666_434096_N9Qpw6&akid=4666%2E434096%2EN9Qpw6)**

clean_body: = Team – The right to vote is a fundamental, founding principle of our nation. While Republican state lawmakers introduce hundreds of bills to suppress voters and pass dozens of laws that limit access to the ballot box, protecting voting rights is more important than ever. Last week, Defend the Vote announced their endorsement of Quaye. = Here’s what they have to say about Quaye: "Defend the Vote is thrilled to stand behind Quaye in his race against Mike Garcia in CA-27. As a retired Naval Commander with over twenty years of service to his country,Quaye is precisely the kind of leader we need in Congress to fight for fair elections and voting access. Quaye will be a voice for all Americans in the halls of Congress, and will deliver for his constituents without fail. History has shown: we can't ever take the right to vote for granted, and that's exactly why Quaye must be elected. " While Quaye is being endorsed by voting rights organizations, Mike Garcia has voted against critical legislation that would expand Californians’ opportunities to vote and combat these voter suppression tactics. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = Thanks for standing with Quaye. name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: what it means to be a Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42041465/331389974/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2U2MmM2NC1hZDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hdnMuFAl4wlZLM-M8MM9FDsDC1R1PlIfFlO7XQOI8yM=&emci=832e55f2-0491-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7ce62c64-ad92-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)

Hello,
Growing up in rural Iowa, I thought we were well-to-do because we had a piano, a well-used sewing machine, a big garden, and a flag pole. Our house was small, one bathroom, for a family of ten. I was surprised to know that not every family struggled with affording the $7 meal ticket each kid needed for school.
Lebanon, Iowa, had eight houses, a church, and a small feed store. My life centered on helping my dad, school, and exploring Dry Creek, a wonderland of aquatic life down the hill. The nearest town was Hudson, SD, nine miles west down a gravel road.
We were the prototypical rural Iowa family. Breakfast, lunch, dinner, lunch, then supper kept the house full of aromas. “Read a book,” would be mom’s terse direction if you showed any idleness. It is from this humble beginning, work as a welder, farmhand, then in a slaughterhouse, that brought me into the U.S. Navy.
America must present an opportunity for its citizens to achieve great things. From homemade clothes (I’m the littlest one) to a three-star Admiral is just one such journey. The next step is to use life’s experiences to continue a lifetime of service to this nation and my state of Iowa.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa because I can represent people from all walks of life. My life’s experiences provided an innate understanding for what it means to be a Democrat:_to care as much for those I’ve never met as I do for those I know_. Obviously, Chuck Grassley is not a Democrat; he seems to only care about what Trump and his corporate PAC donors want.**
People like me aren’t supposed to be able to run and win. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions from corporate special interests to try to make sure I don’t.
If there’s one thing I’ve learned in life, though, it’s that anything is possible when a group of people work together to make it happen. I’m not taking one dime from corporate PACs; instead, I’m running my campaign entirely with support from over 20,000 grassroots donors like you.
[**So please, if you’re able to, will you consider making a donation to my campaign today to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue? Senate control is on the line in my race, and whatever amount you can spare today would go a long way in protecting our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42041467/331389976/-42398318?refcode=em20220220pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2U2MmM2NC1hZDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hdnMuFAl4wlZLM-M8MM9FDsDC1R1PlIfFlO7XQOI8yM=)

name: Nan Whaley
subject: a humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
My team just let me know that we need to raise $15,000 in the next few days to stay on track toward our January fundraising goal. So I’m asking: will you pitch in right now?

Team,
I’m running for governor of Ohio because I believe it’s time for a change.
The same corrupt crew has been running the show in Columbus for far too long now. I know that we can take back this state and get it working again for our families, not the corporate backers.
But it’s going to take all of us standing together and building a movement that will last.
**[I believe we can win – but we’re up against the Mike DeWine fundraising machine, and it’s all hands on deck. So I’m asking: will you pitch in $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42041490/331391027/1959033055?refcode=nw_em_220220_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjM4ZGVjNi1hZDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PlOYqC49TBmY5LXyFIdh6e-vpgZBtmtlQnqwdrC6B64=)**
As the mayor of Dayton, I’ve seen some of Ohio’s biggest challenges up close and personal. From the devastating opioid crisis to the COVID-19 pandemic to a mass shooting in our city, Dayton has been a microcosm of what so many communities are experiencing across the state.
I’ve worked hard to lead Dayton’s response to these issues -- and I believe it will take someone with that kind of experience to help Ohio come back from the biggest crises we’ve ever seen.
It’s time to turn the page in Columbus and elect a governor who will truly work for the people. And I think that we need more leaders like me from the middle class, not another millionaire.
**Are you ready to take back Ohio in 2022? The fight starts right now:**
**[Stand with me now and make a $5 contribution to help us elect new leadership for Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42041491/331391028/1959033055?refcode=nw_em_220220_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjM4ZGVjNi1hZDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PlOYqC49TBmY5LXyFIdh6e-vpgZBtmtlQnqwdrC6B64=)**

Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=630d9c878a714d0aa56eb9a14a097bf5&_e=_j-i9J23xpizlw-eXto0oEwQlWIqAt_2_XFc92OFzvomGhPZAYVT2AGfL_F3LoIzwB6P6pD2mGrZTZcQGcuYlrQ2JLWDqQdVlR_hFLDGxM9PvVa5Umvh4TWwQtBVU2G7GllxiYWcpIHZqxy-21CUfRrS2bRrfZPbp8PSvlcE9XdtP5G64uFffVW_zEyk8V9nrqYboKfeue-WX0JJC1KgObw2BqbJ4aPJpmiPhNuqllhBsrzev2Qxa1wIPv2PzcMiLNaB1QL3a13PLEq66j6p7uA_bxtOH35ppbWhgpiuVLN8wWsJHg3bn7hcyU2DlOyap1aOHOkCHIqnXqWiIlrJJaV55OfdKp_6f-xXNCMssyGSDvBVhCJIJD0LlUwSXP2Q-_4y2FNdgz_hrH5gMRMVBp8sE_eV0H3srO7Sn6pjxy12kAPUTIiZNJtOUg0QcjTsVfqpWBGLMDYReZo3PmTtWw%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported that a recent poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than eight months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Peter, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported that a recent poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than eight months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight eight months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

It’s simple, Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95266?refcode=em20220220-22069&t=1002&akid=22069%2E1203867%2EXtQ8bS ]Tweet from Senator Bernie Sanders saying cancel every penny of student
loan debt

We’re with Bernie: With one swipe of the pen, President Biden could and
SHOULD cancel every penny of student loan debt.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95266?refcode=em20220220-22069&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22069%2E1203867%2EXtQ8bS ]If you agree with Bernie, Justice Democrats, and AOC, chip in
$3 to help us continue our push to cancel student loan debt
»

Biden has the power to provide economic relief to more than 45 million
people. And he has the power to take the single action that could help
Democrats fend off right-wingers from taking control of Congress in 2022
and the White House in 2024.

Canceling student loan debt is not just economic relief, it’s economic
justice.

It’s not just the right thing to do, it’s the politically smart thing to
do.

And with Democrats failing to pass critical health care, climate change,
paid leave, racial justice, and worker rights legislation, Biden and
Democrats should be able to see that canceling student debt is the thing
they can actually accomplish before midterm elections in November.

Will Biden listen to Bernie? Or will the President let crushing student
loan debt stand.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95266?refcode=em20220220-22069&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22069%2E1203867%2EXtQ8bS ]Justice Democrats won’t stop fighting to cancel student loan debt and
supporting candidates who run on getting rid of this burdensome debt. Can
you chip in to fuel our fight? $3, $9 or $27 will help us run our primary
campaigns and advocate for the progressive change we desperately need in
this country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95266?refcode=em20220220-22069&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=22069%2E1203867%2EXtQ8bS ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=22069%2E1203867%2EXtQ8bS ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=22069%2E1203867%2EXtQ8bS ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220220-22069-footer&t=1026&refcode2=22069_1203867_XtQ8bS&akid=22069%2E1203867%2EXtQ8bS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. name: Peter Welch
subject: What’s changed in 30 years (and what hasn’t)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Recently, I was taking a look at an old photograph — and I noticed something.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=111%2E61531%2EJodtxd)
Hello,
I wanted to take a moment to tell you a story of an old photograph I found — and why it’s so important we fight to keep the Senate blue.
Recently, I was going through old things and I found a picture. It was from a hike I’d taken decades ago at Mount Rainier. It was a fun, but grueling, hike with friends and family.
And in the picture, I was wearing the same blue windbreaker that I had on while I was looking at the photo.
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1422?t=3&akid=111%2E61531%2EJodtxd)
This old blue windbreaker has come on many different kinds of adventures with me. Whether it’s been long hikes or daily walks in the woods near the places in Vermont I’ve called home, it’s always protected me from the elements. But even though the jacket has survived in good condition all these years, it’s hard not to notice how much our surrounding environment has changed, and the weather is getting more extreme.
The great outdoors we have access to here are extraordinary — from cross country skiing in the winter and swimming in Lake Champlain in the summer, to the incredible foliage in the fall and breathtaking views from mountaintops — and I want our future generations to have equal opportunities to explore and take advantage of all we have to offer.
A healthy environment doesn’t just provide the air we breathe and the water we drink, it supports entire industries in our state, creates recreational opportunities for families, and makes us all feel better to be outside.
It’s why I’ve made protecting the environment a top priority throughout my career in public service, it’s why I’m working so hard in the House to pass a Green New Deal, and it’s why I’m running for Senate to represent Vermont: we need to get this done, and we need to do it now.
[**If you can, please chip into my campaign right away. It’s going to take all of us, working together, to protect our environment and combat climate change for Vermont and for our future.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1422?t=4&akid=111%2E61531%2EJodtxd)

---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1422?t=9&amount=100&akid=111%2E61531%2EJodtxd)
---

Thanks for your time,
Peter

---

name: AMAZING BIDEN UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: CNN just revealed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **CNN BREAKING:
Biden rejects Trump's attempt to shield White House records from January 6th committee**

---
| **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE NEEDED:**

This is INCREDIBLE.

Donald Trump thought he could get away with hiding evidence from the January 6th committee...

...But President Biden just **REJECTED** Trump's request to shield documents from investigators!

This is HUGE \- so we need to know:

**Do you SUPPORT President Biden 's latest move to hold Trump accountable for his actions on January 6th?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQewyzrH_)
---|---|---

We can't believe what we're seeing.

For MONTHS, Donald Trump and his cronies used every trick in the book to undermine the investigation into the January 6th insurrection.

He even tried to claim that documents from his time in the White House were private and shouldn't be shared with investigators. _**EXCUSE US?!**_

But something AMAZING just happened!!

**President Biden REJECTED Trump 's attempts to shield his records - clearing the way for the January 6th committee to access key documents and information about Trump's actions surrounding that dark day.**

This could be a PIVOTAL moment for the January 6th investigators and for the future of our democracy.

That's why we're urgently collecting data on where our best supporters stand.
**Let us know: Do you SUPPORT President Biden 's latest move to hold Trump accountable for his actions on January 6th?** | [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---
****
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46428173&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MjI3NzQyMAS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46428173&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MjI3NzQyMAS2&l=14416759&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

body:
The DCCC has named IL-11 as one of it's top priorities for the 2022 midterms. Nancy Pelosi and liberal mega-donors are going to spend a lot to beat us | | | [ ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=1b69f9f537&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| | _**BREAKING: DCCC Names IL-11 as One of its Top Priority Races for 2022**_
Friend,

The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) just added our race to its list of top priorities for the 2022 midterms.

Nancy Pelosi sees the momentum our campaign has, and she's NERVOUS.

Democrats are depending on liberal mega-donors like George Soros and Michael Bloomberg spending MILLIONS to defeat us.

We don't have billionaire mega-donors, we have grassroots conservatives like YOU, Friend.

_**[Will you chip in any amount to help us make sure we have the resources to fight back?>>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=1bf59d60d0&e=b78e7c4d40)**_

name: Leora Levy
subject: I escaped Communist Cuba
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leora Levy for U
body:
Have you ever believed in something so strongly, that you’re willing to give up everything? | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=ffe311955b20428d93d90e7f9cc38f6e&_t=3Gjxcg5tzt5kiFYDz1dTeOmKfw8u4Mz47zdPv9uijYVtt-V3Y40NTEWRrWwFCO07ToF-KmA61eZBMlUX_iM7OpCEWxjT6UYsxETFpaglYZIppxp4aO1hZCG5uS1pvvgi7_DsSwR5hV-XXLgElwM0aPGjlzLrQ0ovRvisBvWBJxg%3D).

[
](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ffe311955b20428d93d90e7f9cc38f6e&_e=M-5MnC6QyxmmiePXsDeU9eR96lz5rHTL-W-vmaE1w5ZK6S0vSwBkVXZJiR-LhE8JaKdU8b_vHTi4Y8vBdP13uCjU6BgBJ3W2YzlCJ4Xlm2a_aZmyzOYIMm8ZA4oSOACRH1oBjMjUAcry1Fw1rv-80YAv43pstngPMyi1zWhIy8Eo1XG6Tu7nKEk1J-HyF88AROQoRSsAYTf55yFp2wGoXcuD9277cC5J0rXFW1TmvkUw7pkBgtp1AB8KemB-5pGK6S2zUHMP_PPJMqI7-_6wtLTrhrwgRrRIeRf9dv2fC_dx0sjBSIOUfxtR5-BctLvKNgl1nLRUfoEZ2cKnm7Zf6_2z-mjk2me5zO1o2KmzdVrbwewMB8O5Fk2BTdq00oGKo3p5h_ZCpmzCHI9JrNX0mXB4ssKS86NMtve2PNK9OCi8nkmnzaoCioKtK7v2cTjzq5jL8RTfoLM4EW0GUBrATfQoBcT8ns407ObvGCIRlEo%3D)
---
Peter,

Have you ever believed in something so strongly, that you’re willing to give up everything?

**_My family did and I am thankful every day for their sacrifice._**

I was born in Havana, Cuba, and escaped Castro's Communist Revolution with my family in 1960. I grew up watching a communist dictator destroy my native country. Our family friends who remained were forced to ration food and were oppressed every single day. But Fellow Conservative, I’ve always believed that my life is blessed – and I am grateful every day that my parents risked everything to make sure that we grew up in America where we could be free! They took a chance and together, we made it to the United States.

My parents came here with nothing but through hard work they were able to provide the example and the foundation for me to live the American Dream.

**I am living proof that the American dream is real!**

body:
time is running out
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42041742/331402730/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2465-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdjNjE0Yi1iMjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JZPjtyLJz2uRyHo4oo1odCMwwImq-6_Xjwx-LZ3tr54=)
After I reached out this morning, friend, thousands of grassroots supporters stepped up to help me reach my $10,000 fundraising goal and expand our Senate majority. **But even with this surge, I'm still only 91% of the way to my goal, and time is running out to close the gap before midnight.**
In the race that could decide Senate control, I cannot afford to miss fundraising goals like tonight's – especially not while far-right outside groups dump _millions_ into Florida to make sure Marco Rubio defeats me.
**If we come up short tonight, I'm worried I won't be able to fight back against the GOP's attacks: They're about to blanket Florida voters with TV ads that spread blatant lies about my record. So please, friend, I'm counting on you to step up with an immediate grassroots donation.**
**[Will you give $5 or more before tonight's midnight deadline to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42041743/331402731/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2465-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdjNjE0Yi1iMjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JZPjtyLJz2uRyHo4oo1odCMwwImq-6_Xjwx-LZ3tr54=)**
Thank you so much. I know we can win this pivotal race as long as we do it together.

Val Demings

But even with this surge, I'm still only 91% of the way to my goal, and time is running out to close the gap before midnight. In the race that could decide Senate control, I cannot afford to miss fundraising goals like tonight's – especially not while far-right outside groups dump millions into Florida to make sure Marco Rubio defeats me. If we come up short tonight, I'm worried I won't be able to fight back against the GOP's attacks: They're about to blanket Florida voters with TV ads that spread blatant lies about my record. So please, friend, I'm counting on you to step up with an immediate grassroots donation. = Thank you so much. I know we can win this pivotal race as long as we do it together. name: Congressman John Garamendi
subject: Today is just the start!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Garamendi for Congress** |
body:
I am overjoyed to announce I just filed papers to declare my re-election candidacy for Congress in California’s 8th Congressional District.
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---

| | | | | | | |
---
Dear Friend,

I am overjoyed to announce I just filed papers to declare my re-election candidacy for Congress in California’s 8th Congressional District. Since 2009, I have represented much of the new 8th Congressional District, which includes Contra Costa and Solano Counties. I like to get things done for our communities. In Congress, I have fought for a good economy, good healthcare, good education, and a good future. My promise to the 760,000 people of the 8th Congressional District is that I will never stop fighting for working families. In the last year alone, I’ve:
* Helped author and pass the Infrastructure and Jobs Act into law–which will create new union jobs, build new public transportation, rebuild water and sanitation systems, and repair I-80 and other highways throughout Solano and Contra Costa Counties.
* Secured the largest middle-class tax cut in American history through the American Rescue Plan, with an average tax cut of $3,000 for working families.
* Provided $223 million for Contra Costa schools and $45 million for Solano County schools through the American Rescue Plan.
* Passed legislation to address inflation and supply chain issues to ensure middle-class families have more money in their pockets.

Now, in 2022 and beyond, I will continue fighting for our communities. Together, we can:
* Establish a universal pre-K system and expand the Pell Grant to make a good-quality education attainable for all.
* Create a national paid family leave program to support parents and children alike.
* Pass my “HOME Act” legislation to build new affordable housing.
Lower healthcare costs and ensure healthcare is a basic right for every American.
* Protect our democracy by passing new voting rights legislation.
* Ensure social and economic justice by ending discriminatory practices like redlining.

I will continue fighting for a bold and transformative vision of America. I look forward to presenting my vision to 8th District residents and would be honored to have their continued support.
While I am thrilled at the prospect of representing this district, I will need your help to make it a reality. It will take a lot of resources to establish myself in this district, and I can use your help. If you can volunteer your time please sign up at [https://garamendi.org/volunteer](http://r.garamendiforcongress.org/mk/cl/f/l8PiTkboV0Z0z3sd__2ulI5-_Gnie53xn6OaL0hRZ1UkmuWAObC0ea3xG2HbDHEdTUAsZIAbpf7T38rO-aPMx1Oz0g0j-Ge7eSoX1mhvovtpGsZtenNz8WZ2rDsPJp3WX458NGSsExgzzYM_Hg6t1TpSBXi6gDrtIIxkH97_wRShxJ0F_hY-sRKhxaAZ7AUQCRtqb7T_S3kQ6w), and if you can help us financially please visit [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/john-garamendi-3](http://r.garamendiforcongress.org/mk/cl/f/LV28o5TLHjDYj2WVcNIYdtzPPlkXHHfVPlEPLspPKvotSA7W9ZyfxfvbXmKY2lF7V3qao1AWjsouWmE68lNDZrHBqsVk7uPg9k694N4Y_vAawu4JGKwlPGH4xAZ1Oq-Hc4hSSqAyXlGbI2o9S75aZATNelyjmEzAx8Ebs40kOPs1jDuG7pYY9MO11gVw8lB-DBxsMM_BZJDSeYL_Gm43MWHx7W6CRpP89ekIy5IV1w). Sincerely,
|
---

Congressman John Garamendi

body:
And Sidney Powell Sues Verizon in Attempt to Block Jan. 6 Subpoena

| Why do politicians think they are smarter than you?
---
Mississippi Freedom Caucus
---
| |
---
| |
---
| February 20
---
More Taxes, More Spending
The Mississippi legislature is half-way through the 2022 legislative session which has proven to be a unique year in our state. We have emerged from the COVID “pandemic” and find ourselves with a surplus of over $1 billion in tax revenue sitting in the state treasury. The big question, “What do we do with this extra money?” When the legislature arrived at the capitol in January we were told by the state economist that there was no foreseeable end to this extra money, that the state could expect to collect more and more money every year. Some of us believe that is a foolish and dangerous statement. We know a large portion of this extra money is because of inflation, as prices continue to rise at unprecedented rates, the state collects more money. An example of that is would be if you spend a $100 on groceries the state collects $7, but if due to inflation those same groceries cost $150 the state collects $10.50. We all know inflation has to stop eventually or you will start buying less groceries. Either outcome means the state will collect less. We also know that much of the buying that has taken place in the past year is due to the federal government printing money at an alarming rate and sending “free” money to citizens. This has already stopped to a large degree and will eventually prove itself to be unsustainable. All of this means the extra billion dollars the state has collected is one-time money. When deciding what to do with this money, there are four options that the legislature could choose.
1. Give the money back to the people
2. Cut taxes
3. Pay down the debt
4. Expand Government

**Option 1 – Give the money back to the people**

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I’m disgusted and furious at the Florida GOP’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
it’s vile and abhorrent |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42042135/331407797/1640054012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzMwMjc5Mi1iODkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPQ50dHQpUXIvM841ilQ2Lsw1zVt5NR3xV3tsStT5EY=&emci=e10e931e-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bc302792-b892-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)
---
Folks, I'm disgusted and furious.

If you haven’t heard about the Florida GOP’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill, it’s a proposed law that would _**ban**_ all discussion of LGBTQ+ issues, history, people, and more, in the classroom.

It's a direct attack on our LGBTQ+ youth who already face higher risks of bullying and suicide. This bill is anti-history and goes against creating safe learning environments in our schools.

**[_I’m calling on Florida Republicans in the state Senate and House to kill this bill and end their crusade against LGBTQ+ students. Please make your own voice heard and sign my petition._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42042136/331407798/1640054012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzMwMjc5Mi1iODkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPQ50dHQpUXIvM841ilQ2Lsw1zVt5NR3xV3tsStT5EY=&emci=e10e931e-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bc302792-b892-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)**

Unfortunately, this isn’t the first time Gov. DeSantis and his allies in the Florida Legislature have attacked the LGBTQ+ community.

On the _first day_ of Pride Month 2021, the governor signed an anti-transgender bill. It was abhorrent then, and it’s abhorrent now.

**_[Friend, please sign the petition as soon as you possibly can. We need to show Florida Republicans that the vast majority of Floridians do not support this vile, hateful bill.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42042137/331407799/1640054012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzMwMjc5Mi1iODkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPQ50dHQpUXIvM841ilQ2Lsw1zVt5NR3xV3tsStT5EY=&emci=e10e931e-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bc302792-b892-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)_**

— Charlie Crist
