disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
The Biden administration seizing $7 billion from Afghanistan’s central bank was an act of profound cowardice and corruption. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78OfUg7g0bT3KWj5PFlOrwylcmVHgVhvfe2ZPl5W7AdMasWx0pq0-MMyAzfl_wsULChrcHwoMM57u0__ZsLuEX2FnMMGZ5bjLH52ZXhSKywVUPyhPjY1KNvuIH_FKnxv5fvW7PfxMHPZcWkbHHMsuwcfI1CJfvaHCgdFg7Mhu_bkdhx8CJkxkivGiO02VK5OrmJaGRSfAREqJRU1zr4ZHxmmuGsaDjsALsHbMU-kMtxf9NcrYvP9ZodB-jgh9ZxwTJncoHrSDmAP45hkMD4Eiot_8ze-jufN_ImXEGyjIV1lc1jJZU8IiF2Z4cTyv9DP5Jsi5VGqGloPzVYu59ycTQ26wmpSe6RAerQOnJzfrR_I6R/3jq/ffucmIOOSFa5WkMkU4RYaA/h0/I7nhetEmYm9fVK86nvrr0bPl19u01ueE3RjfpGtsN_w)
| | Dear Peter, Last August, as the U.S. withdrew from Afghanistan and the Taliban took power, Washington seized $7 billion in assets from Afghanistan's central bank. The resulting saga reveals military industrial corruption that demands accountability. [**Can you stand with us to challenge corruption, stop wars for profit, and protect human rights in countries targeted by the Pentagon and CIA?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MKro0Fnl1FR3FHE-M0C9h3CFTAH22sYJ2SBmnp_UCrL3V0CMbk421tFeHkhaD1y7B16xdCJiKmu44B7f-zx-7D0HQiIG516CexkJYHQgo7-sNIFkUZiLY6gakKrdQTzNrerUwiL4Z62oW0w29eWmFPJcPpHWSHUgIUj_R4ywbbG8L6imiSfOISrjsdn6NsyQrzpVWL5UyqdJN73PD_R6CxpkLQmRwOU7kI3atKklpeE3DvJLSTqjStXrICnQp01mhmm7y3gZlp-ctohfoa7mNcvbbOEbYSa5j8X0CzRp_nuY3q0NTX3ezqHvNDt0NfBvaJbv7SQZwQndkZzVYaE9X66BN-eKFGiSIQLe9HqOh2b2w/3jq/ffucmIOOSFa5WkMkU4RYaA/h1/17Hh19tfOBgRlgwqB3HdL7ReDpLD8rvx1ZsgMgtmhks) After a mounting outcry, the Biden administration last week agreed to release half of the funds. Yet the administration continues to drag its feet, pointing the finger at domestic courts resolving claims by the families of 9/11 victims. At no point in this saga have Washington’s actions been defensible. From the fraud pervading 20 years of war waged on Afghanistan, to the decision to seize its assets in the first place, U.S. foreign policy has reflected a continuing bipartisan commitment to neocolonial resource extraction and impunity for human rights violations. Even the recent decision to subject Afghanistan’s funds to domestic court proceedings reeks of corruption. No Afghans were involved in the 9/11 attacks, which were perpetrated by Saudi hijackers. Saudi Arabia, meanwhile, remains the beneficiary of U.S. weapon sales enabling an ongoing genocide in Yemen. The hypocrisy is even worse than that. Biden not only seized Afghanistan’s central reserves, but also imposed crippling sanctions targeting not the government, but the civilian population. As a result, the _New York Times_ estimated that “22.8 million people—more than half the country’s population—are expected to face potentially life-threatening food insecurity this winter.” Even worse, the administration officials who engineered these disturbing policies include at least one lawyer poised to reap a personal financial windfall by representing the 9/11 families seeking Afghanistan’s funds in federal court. The dimensions of corruption in Washington compound each other, constructing a whole worse than the sum of its parts. [**Are you willing to defend human rights from Washington? As a candidate who emerged from the direct action movement challenging Bush’s wars, I’m running for Congress in 2022 to expose the fraud pervading U.S. foreign policy, and educate Americans about a history that too few ever learn.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MKro0Fnl1FR3FHE-M0C9h3CFTAH22sYJ2SBmnp_UCrL3V0CMbk421tFeHkhaD1y7B16xdCJiKmu44B7f-zx-7D0PIE8jLLzYJX70ll_rm4qA0PibINqdDqrEeyvWZSPTVH6lMB6U6-_uDnmUyu5vtYqNCw379cgSLfnY2Dzu3SwM4cgQv4086uUP645tsBY0twq9SQw-BP9_KI6wzrYzH5Y9pEBvofj2K8-qGvABjjbEzdvniO5NFmD4olbPYxfsRY2Li4hRDJAea-hCzgi0bQ5cH4V-UTOWUDs5Bv_mBwBlYX8b0XdFPV3_KSq7drZHJ94VR3iK8CGmA23kb5-HsW77SU2Flbh1DKtWGkLFpdqlQ/3jq/ffucmIOOSFa5WkMkU4RYaA/h2/JB8JCcqV3G5NcJNDXxZDKFnjQS65q6vyAAvIC0JCEAE) Many Americans ignore foreign policy, focusing instead on domestic social needs that impact our communities here at home. A recent survey by journalist Henry Norr documented that pattern even among candidates for Congress, while specifically citing our campaign among the exceptions to that disappointing rule. As an immigrant, I find political myopia more than merely disturbing. It may seem reasonable for voters to be most concerned about the issues that directly impact them and their families, but that focus obscures a perverse irony. Only U.S. voters have any influence at all over the military industrial complex that subjects civilian populations around the world to occupation, random acts of arbitrary lethal violence, and the corporate resource extraction that has tragically accelerated global climate chaos. Our race to end the Pelosi dynasty is motivated by more than politics, including a commitment to human rights, democracy, and accountability. Each of those principles are routinely violated with bipartisan support, which is why we so desperately need civilian oversight of the Pentagon, Washington & Wall Street's extended military industrial complex, and the pattern of war, resource extraction, and climate chaos that they together enable. [**Can you join us to end the 34-year career of an oligarch complicit in ongoing colonialism?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MKro0Fnl1FR3FHE-M0C9h3CFTAH22sYJ2SBmnp_UCrL3V0CMbk421tFeHkhaD1y7B16xdCJiKmu44B7f-zx-7D0qq0_IzPnYtG06QBaJxshGDMPQT9BEjcN-R78BQ-7ZscCtfGHGE4Bg35YTOdJ7RUEBc6XC3YVhW3xPHqp-E-5eLP9mxhTYhPzsWAcYO2bgkRQCBdayRZVNvR3nOLe4DBGEbAZg_i_3BV0gnmfQihppWdky7fsTrI8K0C36vKvlaFpqrYxI045SFefA9WZC0eLuvQzjGYVIwyWsOkQcUF7i7e8HpW4JvCkcvDDNdzjAIN0QitN4jd6oQ5XSbFOfTQAamEV6XrdvXqFLgwSb42DWw/3jq/ffucmIOOSFa5WkMkU4RYaA/h3/JFgdoENWwpCqfBFsGxLOpycwODnh85EbRRlJDCR3ff0) For 20 years, I’ve taken direct action to challenge Bush’s fraudulent wars. For that entire time, Americans who pay attention have been outraged by Nancy Pelosi choosing to fund them. While grateful that Biden formally ended the last of them, we're disturbed by the seizure of Afghanistan‘s central reserves. It represents not only a continuation of Bush-era colonialism, but also profound cowardice and corruption. It’s also ironic: the funds had been held in the United States in order to keep them secure, yet it was the United States that ultimately stole them. Washington knows no shame, or limit to the extent of its public hypocrisy. That hypocrisy, however, relies on the political deference of Congress, which has routinely rubberstamped every proposed military spending increase of the past generation, while failing to hold accountable agencies from NSA to CIA that continue to undermine the rights of foreigners and Americans alike. I frequently call out corruption, which emerges in many forms. Its most direct reflection is congressional insider trading, but a foreign policy establishment that wages fraudulent wars, and then steals from governments in crisis while their citizens starve, is no less corrupt. Its abuses abroad are simply less visible, since the impacts of our actions are felt halfway across the globe. [**Can you make a campaign contribution today to send to Congress a voice from the peace movement poised to help stop the next war before it starts?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MKro0Fnl1FR3FHE-M0C9h3CFTAH22sYJ2SBmnp_UCrL3V0CMbk421tFeHkhaD1y7B16xdCJiKmu44B7f-zx-7D0Vy2yJ0qRreod4rlveLmeMWz4wpuwIrkWAtl6SbpZWnynoSDXKXwIpGCVvl1FcykxCBIIwi34TGmlv1_SY_ZG-k9BRujJ9elNo7uPLb85aJkgtbhFTxIHzwuPmpWIDU4Nj61LsoQZfJz-kkbLv2GmJCdyxy-B9iyLkf0YbSnIVXMFm-IiRHROVPzRlbRrhuO_qEMaEH-l7hILls_zLPs70TKx2EOI6y6LnI9wMT3lnOmTWrgu37uBQxVQLkUOutnYeqclQne8qFMPvPNv2u6eRA/3jq/ffucmIOOSFa5WkMkU4RYaA/h4/ylFcT_vQTqF1CCMOHFNdlXel2UnljlDvKUZnqKyZPQM) Our campaign is running up the steepest hill in politics because solidarity—either with the future or with other countries—demands it. We’re grateful for the solidarity that you & our thousands of other supporters have shown with us! Your voice,
Shahid |

It’s also ironic: the funds had been held in the United States in order to keep them secure, yet it was the United States that ultimately stole them. Washington knows no shame, or limit to the extent of its public hypocrisy. That hypocrisy, however, relies on the political deference of Congress, which has routinely rubberstamped every proposed military spending increase of the past generation, while failing to hold accountable agencies from NSA to CIA that continue to undermine the rights of foreigners and Americans alike. I frequently call out corruption, which emerges in many forms. Its most direct reflection is congressional insider trading, but a foreign policy establishment that wages fraudulent wars, and then steals from governments in crisis while their citizens starve, is no less corrupt. Its abuses abroad are simply less visible, since the impacts of our actions are felt halfway across the globe. Our campaign is running up the steepest hill in politics because solidarity—either with the future or with other countries—demands it. We’re grateful for the solidarity that you & our thousands of other supporters have shown with us! Your voice, Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Shahid for Change, please .

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: My State of the Union pitch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=1)
---
Friend --_****_ Great news! Our new [Sandlot video](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot_donor?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=2) has reached more than 1.4 million people, and given the incredible response we've received, we're ready to take it to an even bigger audience of engaged Americans. On Tuesday, March 1st, we plan to broadcast the video on national television immediately following President Biden's State of the Union address. This is a huge opportunity, and I'm excited to introduce our movement to millions of new people. | [](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot_donor?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=3 "OUR SACRED SANDLOT") [OUR SACRED SANDLOT](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot_donor?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=3)
---
And if you're one for souvenirs, we've released a brand new limited edition hand-signed baseball to keep with our Sandlot theme. Check them out in our [shop](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRNj_hm5IDZcMUMjFNESB0mIyd2ONQqmo5LTuIRKfg3VSBDZoslema5W3NcrvgibYUpxG5Uc0kmfhB1T8dZ2Zv6Q&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=4), along with all of our awesome gear. 100% of the proceeds go toward building this movement and a better future for our kids and grandkids.
[](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRNj_hm5IDZcMUMjFNESB0mIyd2ONQqmo5LTuIRKfg3VSBDZoslema5W3NcrvgibYUpxG5Uc0kmfhB1T8dZ2Zv6Q&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=5)
Thanks for all you do. Whether it's [spreading the word](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=6), [volunteering](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=7), [donating](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=8), or even just replying with a word of encouragement, it all adds up -- and I'm grateful.
Country First,
Adam
_PS: I'll be delivering the keynote address at the[The Summit](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWVSV0lkURn_1w8GFF1kGLp14a6AAFfkTkFzVIxLKQskCZXEzLT-H8Pq3bWYWVSrb9PIaPDslfatTshlrDd6etFw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=9), hosted by Principles First (no relation to Country First), on Sunday, February 27th. Imagine CPAC, but with principled pro-democracy conservatives and no golden statues of Trump. If this sounds interesting to you, and you'll be in the DC area, check out the event info [here](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWVSV0lkURn_1w8GFF1kGLp14a6AAFfkTkFzVIxLKQskCZXEzLT-H8Pq3bWYWVSrb9PIaPDslfatTshlrDd6etFw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=10)._
**< < Begin Forwarded Message >>**
Friend --
It's easy to take for granted this grand experiment we call the United States; how blessed we are to call her home. It's easy to get lost in the toxicity; to lose sight of the centering principles that make us uniquely American.
Our political parties and media sure don't help, either. They remind us how we're different, who's to blame, and why the sky is falling -- with no one to blame but the "other side."
What really should scare us most is that our kids are watching. While we may see this as a dark chapter, our youth are growing up believing this is normal: That the ends justify the means; that the winner must take all; that the only way to win is at all costs; and that violence is "legitimate political discourse."
Instead, we could learn something from them:
[](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=11)
[](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=12 "Watch the NEW Video: ") [Watch the NEW Video: "Our Sacred Sandlot"](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=13)
---
Our movement is experiencing incredible momentum and growth right now, and it's because so many Americans are waking up to the reality that we can't keep going this way and end up anywhere good. Our parties are playing a dangerously divisive game -- one in which each promises they'll win, yet we all end up losing.
It's time to change the game; to stand for truth; to save our sacred "sandlot." That's exactly what we're all about, and I'm proud to have you with me.
Country First,
Adam
_PS: Please help me spread this message far and wide, and encourage your likeminded friends and family to learn more about the amazing work we're doing together. Here's the link to the video:[ https://www.country1st.com/sandlot](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=14)_
Paid for by Country First
---
[](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot_donor?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=15) ["OUR SACRED SANDLOT"](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot_donor?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=16)
---
Country First · PO Box 2385, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.country1st.com/unsubscribe?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=17).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sandlot_sotu_nd2&n=18), software for leaders.

clean_body: He knows how much is at stake for this brand-new seat. | Friend, With the fate of the entire House majority resting on our race for Texas’ NEW 38th congressional district, President Trump knows exactly how much is on the line. I’m truly honored to have the President’s endorsement in this must-win race. But with election day just DAYS away and early voting already in full swing, we’re racing against the clock to meet our FINAL Election Day goal. With only 5 SEATS needed to end Pelosi’s majority, we can’t take a single one of these races for granted. We can’t just have any old Republicans running in these 5 critical seats – we need true conservative warriors who have the spine to fight back against the radical Left. President Trump knows that after years of combat missions flying Apache helicopters, I have the fight and determination in me to build a new America First House majority. But now, with just days remaining in my race, the endorsement that matters to me most is YOURS. Fellow American,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ffdfbb7e720c498586bcd249e40ce9d6&_e=d3FwIXeA0jP6_pPIUfw4YCRCvPKYW3P6aZ5WuPKb0J4SPNV6MncT0BYqUs_HqDGFND9OTMK2jCYIZK91WHeUvV8EqRUFX3S26-8y5IC03TbBQtzOQ_d5Jljq_7iuv18dYzi9v0Pira8pYR2MPjUj3CzVtSK9qbekv59K_CclCSTRTg7e2PBKv8VIT9eOVkr_qQhQ9UMJmDgyPSdqmxHRRn57NnC3ICjF3vyPXCdHIDG1yg0avGQV6M4UApUxJb_6Zmd3HP05FBxn4nxrBKRrkeDgW7J5m2rkdHq7WvdnvMw1w_GKFMTixOaY5tHj7kSK6NWbv0Xes56UTHIoXX_uNNcc-6fx_hFHYdT5qo8m4yRIeNTflgXOgecdV5ntegOtvUMMRKa7Dl_5NaDIfj7UMBRZ1hCiTOAf4oB-JH2opYKT5vLp3ez4BI6UgBRsmA1xj8-m1HlxQxOp7WESRs-rvw%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported that a recent poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than eight months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported that a recent poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than eight months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight eight months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

| Team, when we heard what the latest AZ GOP proposal was, we were in disbelief. But it’s true, **the AZ GOP wants to force AZ students to go through mandatory NRA gun classes.**

In fact, one member of the AZ GOP went even further. He said if parents opted their children out of the classes, he would _forward their names and addresses to Child Protective Services._

That is insane, team!

**[Team, we’ve launched a petition fighting back against this crazy proposal from the AZ GOP. AZ students do not need NRA indoctrination in the classroom. clean_body: | | | This is insanity from the AZ GOP | | | Team, when we heard what the latest AZ GOP proposal was, we were in disbelief. But it’s true, the AZ GOP wants to force AZ students to go through mandatory NRA gun classes. In fact, one member of the AZ GOP went even further. He said if parents opted their children out of the classes, he would forward their names and addresses to Child Protective Services. That is insane, team! This is just the latest instance of the AZ GOP taking things too far. To threaten parents with turning them into CPS if they opt out of an NRA class is extreme. This just shows the AZ GOP is too beholden to special interests that they would stoop this low to threaten families with this nonsense. **Deadline Midnight Sincerely, AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit ** Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Sharing a few photos with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Team —

For years, Democrats and Republicans have promised to lower prescription drug costs. But every time Washington gets close, Big Pharma steps in and politicians cave. I have had enough of it.

This past week, I released **[my plan to lower prescription drug prices and hold the big pharmaceutical companies accountable for rising costs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42042601/331409230/-769242027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2U4ZTgzMi1iZjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AtllJTD7JAXxreQbFjrL9DhZZ2pMj_sE8pbRucd3iaU=&emci=02e8e832-bf92-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=03e8e832-bf92-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)** Here’s what I believe we need to do:
* Allow Medicare to negotiate for lower drug prices
* Push for an out-of-pocket cap on prescription drug costs for seniors
* Cap the price of insulin and other widely-used drugs
* Stop Big Pharma from hiking up prices beyond the rate of inflation
* Eliminate the tax giveaway for Big Pharma and hold them accountable
* End patent thicket maneuvering so low-cost generic drugs can be produced
* Create an international price index to prevent drug companies from price gouging Americans

I’m focused on building an agenda for all Wisconsinites so that we can get this U.S. Senate seat working for everyone again — because the people of our state may not be Ron Johnson’s priority, but they are mine. That’s why I’ve been out on the road having important conversations to help shape what we’re fighting for in this campaign.

As you know by now, I’m a doer, not a talker. So after we put out our plan, we held a roundtable discussion with folks in Green Bay to talk about the rising cost of prescription drugs and the urgent need to stop Big Pharma from hiking up prices even more. I listened to their personal stories and talked about what we can do to lower costs for working families across the board.

For too long, pharmaceutical companies have been raking in record profits while regular people are forced to skip pills to make their prescriptions last longer or choose between groceries and life-saving drugs. Why? Because too many politicians — Republicans and some Democrats — lack the courage to stand up to Big Pharma’s greed.

**It's a broken system, and Ron Johnson isn’t doing anything to fix it.**

It’s time to replace him with someone who actually gives a damn about working families — and is willing to get out there and fight for them. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate, and unlike Ron Johnson, I will never stop showing up, listening, and working as hard as possible to get results. _You have my word._

Flipping any seat from red to blue is a challenge, especially during a midterm election in Wisconsin (you can take my word for it!). It’s an effort that requires a LOT of resources. While we’re creating an agenda that works for everyone and getting our message out across the state, I’m hoping I can count on you to help us win.

[**Please consider making a small contribution to our campaign so we can keep having these important conversations with Wisconsin voters about the issues impacting their communities. If we want to defeat Ron Johnson, we need to build a campaign that can compete everywhere and talk to everyone, which is exactly what we’re doing. Your donations make our work possible.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42042602/331409231/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220220_plan_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220220_plan_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2U4ZTgzMi1iZjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AtllJTD7JAXxreQbFjrL9DhZZ2pMj_sE8pbRucd3iaU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42042603/331409232/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220220_plan_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220220_plan_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2U4ZTgzMi1iZjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AtllJTD7JAXxreQbFjrL9DhZZ2pMj_sE8pbRucd3iaU=)

I’m so proud of the work we’re doing here, and I hope you are too. Your generous support directly funds our work on the ground in Wisconsin, and I can’t thank you enough for chipping in what you can when you can.

I also want to thank everyone who has taken the time to join us on the road. Stay safe, be well, and take care of yourself.

Forward!

— Sarah Godlewski

| | Peter, As one of Andy’s strongest supporters, we wanted to personally invite you to join our Q&A session with Andy this Friday! A leader in the progressive movement, Andy is running for reelection in Michigan’s new Eleventh District this November, and would appreciate greatly your support. **Virtual Q &A with Andy Levin**
Friday, February 25, 2022
5:00 - 6:00 PM ET
Zoom link and details to come
[_**RSVP HERE**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42039210/331370817/171429101?refcode=em_20220220_e_t_qa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDY5NjE0Zi05NjkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRtwRqLM9TtQbrygKVl6ct0rca84NhJcAyJnzHUlVV0=) Everyone is welcome to join us and learn more about why Andy Levin is the best possible candidate to represent MI-11. name: Tim
subject: The longest email I’ll ever send you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ][IMG]

This is the longest email I’ll ever send you, so I hope you’ll read the
whole thing.

I want to share our game plan for flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat
blue—when you’re running in a swing state that Trump won, you can’t leave
anything to chance.

That’s why I have to ask: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7896?t=1009&amount=28&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Will you make a $28 donation to help us on
the road to victory to flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate
majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7896?t=1010&amount=28&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Chip in

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step One: Talk to Folks in Every Corner of Ohio

Working class Ohioans, in our big cities and our small towns, know what
it’s like to be left out and left behind. I won’t be that kind of Senator.

We kicked off this campaign by launching a Workers First Tour. Since then,
we’ve been traveling all over Ohio—visiting union halls, factories,
restaurants, and even a few bars—to hear from folks about the challenges
they’re facing.

The truth is, a lot of people don’t trust politicians, and they have every
reason to be skeptical. The only way to break through that is to look
someone in the eye, shake their hand, and let them see that you don’t have
eight heads.

The opposition might be spending millions of dollars on attack ads, but
your donations allow me to do what matters—show up and meet folks
face-to-face.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step Two: Stand Up to Special Interests and Put Workers First

I’ve made more than a few headlines for getting loud (okay, outright
yelling) on the House floor, because when it comes to speaking up for the
hardworking people out there busting their rear ends every day, I’ll never
hold my tongue.

Whether it’s China, Big Pharma, a corporate giant trying to ship jobs
overseas, or a member of my own party—I’m not afraid to take on anyone who
tries to leave our workers high and dry.

If that puts a target on my back, so be it.

My opponents can rely on the steady support of dark-money groups, but I’m
proud to run a campaign that’s powered by grassroots supporters like
you—not right-wing special interests and tech billionaires.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step Three: Focus On The Issues That Matter

The vast majority of Americans are working harder and longer, making less,
and falling further behind. CEOs are getting golden parachutes, while our
seniors are cutting pills in half because they can’t afford their
medications.

You wouldn’t know it from listening to my GOP opponents though—all they do
is yell about the culture war du jour. We’re not going to flip Ohio blue
and expand our Democratic majority by starting fights over Big Bird and
Dr. Seuss—we need to stay focused on the issues that matter.

It doesn’t matter if I’m talking to a Democrat, Independent, or
Republican—I’m talking about jobs and wages. I’m talking about making Ohio
a manufacturing powerhouse. Lowering the cost of prescription drugs.
Expanding broadband access. Making sure our kids get a good education.

Republicans are trying to make this race about anger, division, and fear
because they know that when it comes down to the issues that actually make
a difference for working families, they’ll lose every time.

That’s why my team has to send you emails like this one—so we’ll have the
resources to get our message out over all this GOP nonsense.

I’m giving this race everything I’ve got, but I can’t win this thing
alone. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7896?t=1011&amount=28&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]I’m personally asking you to rush a donation of $28 so we can
carry out our campaign strategy, flip Ohio blue, and finally cut workers
in on the deal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7896?t=1012&amount=28&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Donate $28 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7896?t=1013&amount=50&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7896?t=1014&amount=100&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7896?t=1015&amount=200&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7896?t=1016&amount=250&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7896?t=1008&amount=30&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Other Amount

Thanks for your support,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=2387%2E3611125%2EMSAZcZ ][IMG]

clean_body: I just endorsed Ohio’s next Senator | Friends, I am honored to endorse one of the hardest-working Republican candidates in modern politics for the Ohio Senate seat. In this crowded field of candidates, Jane knows how to win in Ohio, and that will be key in helping us take back the Senate from the Democrats. Jane is running the most energized campaign of this cycle because she is passionate about her agenda for Ohio and America. I’ve watched Jane throughout her career – She has a record of success, including working tirelessly for years to support Republicans at every level. She led the effort as Ohio GOP’s chairwoman to elect Republicans to all statewide constitutional offices in 2018. She also led our Republican Party’s effort to win Ohio by 8 points for President Trump in 2020. | | | The Bottom Line: Our nation needs honest, hardworking politicians to cut through the dysfunction in Washington. If I know anything, it’s that Jane Timken is the epitome of a Conservative disrupter. She’s a one-of-a-kind leader who has everything it takes to lead this country to a better path. Let’s win this fight and turn Ohio RED. Thank you, Senator Rob Portman Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio Jane Timken for Ohio 9856 Archer Ln, Dublin, OH 43017 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update Feb. 20, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d12b3d790899/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8851597?e=698f056321)
---
Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
“Never give in–never, never, never, never, in nothing great or small, large or petty, never give in except to convictions of honor and good sense; Never yield to force; never yield to the apparently overwhelming might of the enemy._―_ Winston Churchill
|
---
| | | | | |
### Celebrated the Krewe of Neptune
Why is Mardi Gras great? It's about relationships; relationships that transcend politics and divisions. It was an honor to celebrate the Krewe of Neptune this weekend, Queen Venus XXXVII and her family. Being Congressman requires staying connected with those you represent. As Congressman, I will always remain connected & will never forget from where I hail.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Servant Leadership
Servant leadership is the heartbeat of our campaign. Elected officials nowadays continuously put themselves above their constituents. I have always approached my job of representing people with a servant leader mindset, after all, it is what I was elected to do. It is clear that our leadership in D.C. has its own self-serving agenda. If elected as your Congressman, I vow to Protect, Secure, Listen and Lead. Selflessly. I have been surrounded by good hard working people all my life. With barely a high school education, my great grandfather Ed Poppy Wiggins (featured in this photo) started Wiggins drug store and became mayor of Pascagoula. It is role models like these that have inspired me to lead selflessly.Watch our servant leadership policy video by clicking [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1de15554f0&e=698f056321) to learn more about why I am the right servant leader for South Mississippi.|
---
| | | | | |
### Attended Fred Haise Statue Dedication
This was a fabulous dedication for a fabulous Biloxian! Astronaut Fred Haise is a true American hero, and this statue recognizes that! It’s an example of why, with the right leadership, vision and know-how, South Mississippi can be seen as an economic leader of the nation. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1eece66e74&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on economic development.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Met with Pascagoula Mayor’s Youth Council
It was great having the Pascagoula Mayor's Youth Council visit the state capitol this week. This group of young people's ambition to get involved and work on their leadership skills will put them on the path of success.It is critical to be a positive example of what true leadership looks like for our future generations. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=25b4005dc9&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on making public service attractive to young people.|
---
| | | | | |
### Speech to Mississippi College School of Law’s Health Law Society
I spoke to Mississippi College School of Law’s Health Law Society about the intersection of health policy and politics, something we have been living with during the pandemic. A big thank you to Dean Patricia Bennett and Dean Jonathon Hill for allowing me to come speak.Young adults like Hung Nguyen of Biloxi remind me of when I was just a young lawyer and now I am running to be your Congressman. I’m thankful for the lessons I’ve learned at this wonderful institution that have helped me along the way.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Hattiesburg: My Former Teachers!
Having your middle school teachers on your team has got to be a good sign! Hattiesburg natives now, Coach Anthony Ladner and Sharon Ladner were wonderful teachers at Pascagoula Junior High (now Trent Lott Academy). No doubt they influenced my work on early education! Thanks John Burkes for setting up the reunion! Hattiesburg is a special place.Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=3cee35b5b7&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on early education.|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
## The Week Ahead
* House Bills will be handled in Senate committees
* Work on BP/GCRF and other appropriations beginning
* Tax reform plans likely to be considered

|
---
Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d6f91c39d6&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
Keep Up With Us!
| | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=bf9b84f814&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2745103a9f&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=16b3facca6&e=698f056321)| [](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e81b6c2219&e=698f056321)

name: Team Patty
subject: What Mitch McConnell would do to our environment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
This is another reason we can’t allow a GOP Senate.
#
Peter,
Even without the Senate majority, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are looking for any opportunity they can get to undermine our progress to protect the environment and tackle the climate crisis.
The Biden Administration recently released guidance for states about how to implement new funding from the infrastructure law in environmentally-friendly ways. And what was McConnell’s response? He sent a letter to governors advising them to _ignore_ these climate forward recommendations.
**[If this is what McConnell is doing now – imagine what he’d do if he became Majority Leader. We absolutely can’t afford to let the GOP halt our progress to protect the environment. Will you make a $5 donation to keep the Senate blue so we can fight the climate crisis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42042914/331410676/1856588497?refcode=pm_em_220220_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JhYmM4My1jYTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBKkYsGwhMN6ykunCEb82OQ3kuNkhl_7Ok-d7viieBs=)**
Senator Murray and her fellow Democrats understand the stakes – and they are focused on fighting for a more resilient future for our children while addressing the impacts we feel today.
It’s up to us to stop the anti-science, anti-environment Republicans in their tracks, Peter.
**[We can keep making progress on climate and so many other urgent issues, but only if we defend and expand our Democratic Senate majority. If McConnell and the GOP win the Senate in November, we won’t stand a chance. Rush in your $5 contribution now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42042915/331410677/1856588497?refcode=pm_em_220220_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JhYmM4My1jYTkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBKkYsGwhMN6ykunCEb82OQ3kuNkhl_7Ok-d7viieBs=)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Patty

| | | Hi there, If you order DoorDash in Tacoma, it might be me delivering your order 👋 [_I’m not a wealthy, self-funded candidate, which is why I appreciate every dollar given to my campaign. Please chip in here if you can, so I can keep growing my team and win this race._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42042933/331410944/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTc0M2IwZS1kMDkyLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PI4oZnbZnEER1iw04O51BnqoTvQLdv2g0X6LskepRnM=) My work slowed down a lot during the pandemic and hasn’t picked back up to where it was, so I’m supplementing with DoorDash. The pandemic has been challenging for me, with periods of housing instability — it’s been hard for so many people. I’ve met a senior who skips prescriptions so she can afford rent, a person in a wheelchair living in an encampment because she can’t afford to rent a place with a wheelchair ramp, a young family doubling up with extra roommates because they can’t afford a mortgage. And it’s not only here in my district; it’s across the country. 30 million people don’t have healthcare — during a pandemic. 1 in 5 kids are going hungry — during a pandemic. The bipartisan elite just let the expanded Child Tax Credit expire, pushing 4 million kids into poverty — during a pandemic. [**I’m running for Congress to fight for jobs, housing, and healthcare for all. I’m running because time is running out on climate. Friend,

I have to share this with you.

Speech therapy clinics in Palm Beach, Florida, are noting significant increases in the number of children enrolling at their practices. One speech clinic noted that before the pandemic, only 5% of patients were babies and toddlers, while today, **it’s up to 20%.**

**A critical step in speech development is the ability to observe others speaking - and the Radical Left has _taken away our kids' ability to do so._**

Therapists are attributing this steep increase in speech therapy among young children to the **mask mandates put in place due to COVID-19.** | [**STOP MASKING OUR KIDS** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=4c70be2b1a9e43e38c7a2d138d13e669&_e=ee6sN9zxJYN_4msHE0RuWs7uYJeanNlE7z8FG4yTcjkzz3MHVeIpri7KSL7-hM_Px5iwo-6eZKfyKHSiwhtt7rsmIqf9sU1xugDjQQYpBy60p3Z0spxB43dvxKLH4OEFu6ACVVi_r2YO6xHx9zIEuKJ9u7Up7RMTfvt1j6rRJD_BQnAdZoJK0KKu4Sc4jyDHyGV6JMO17iGmh2IG-gRBTKsKmD4PTkdN6l1VYTBcqy0vu4Ckd09n0ZB8nWIitpvwqtI-hNEXOHgIszBHNJlhYvB3BTsD7MMqYJOfjHJSANvELyJMDrQztqu88fETQ5U_TWJa-iakRnrgqpFSlIcbQrP8w4-n9MgrtKqY8g9nil1QVn73lRCtIxmdxeYGHbWyIGguN4Y_RvlEYqDeR6tD85zZHE6qLar9tg6bTQarvxdqr2fJjU5NebVCdyiShopnrmZyCTEk7dCf_12MkatLH0VY2GcBT4x-5ripbRvygU2WtMzQSFWJdvkPQJfCq6uN)

_**_This breaks my heart._**_

I am **AGAINST** the masking of our children - in schools, in churches, or anywhere else.

I’m proud to live in the Commonwealth of Virginia where Governor Youngkin issued the Executive Order to allow parents the choice to mask or not mask their kids. But we have to ensure that ALL kids in America are able to function normally, instead of suffering under mandates and masks.

Join Team Vega today to support a conservative in Congress who will NEVER support a mask mandate.

God Bless,

clean_body: I will never support masks | Friend, I have to share this with you. Speech therapy clinics in Palm Beach, Florida, are noting significant increases in the number of children enrolling at their practices. One speech clinic noted that before the pandemic, only 5% of patients were babies and toddlers, while today, it’s up to 20%. A critical step in speech development is the ability to observe others speaking - and the Radical Left has taken away our kids' ability to do so. Therapists are attributing this steep increase in speech therapy among young children to the mask mandates put in place due to COVID-19. | This breaks my heart. I am AGAINST the masking of our children - in schools, in churches, or anywhere else. I’m proud to live in the Commonwealth of Virginia where Governor Youngkin issued the Executive Order to allow parents the choice to mask or not mask their kids. But we have to ensure that ALL kids in America are able to function normally, instead of suffering under mandates and masks. Join Team Vega today to support a conservative in Congress who will NEVER support a mask mandate. God Bless, Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife.
